Peter,

First, I want to thank everyone who supported us ahead of the first Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly fundraising deadline of the year. We’re committed to flipping the House in 2024 and sending public service pros to office up and down the ballot, and grassroots supporters like you are crucial to that goal.

Tomorrow, voters in Wisconsin and Chicago will head to the polls for crucial state and local elections, and we’re working to make sure they have the information they need to send public service pros to office.

[Wisconsin voters can click here to learn how to cast their ballot for Janet Protasiewicz, a former educator who is running for the Wisconsin Supreme Court.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61241984/399513027/-372954170?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNGQ2ZGVhLTdiZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ROIdb0O3vPdhdx0QbBaXplQh0KiRRPtWhugaE0FudqI=&emci=28415e05-51d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=104d6dea-7bd2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)

[Chicago voters can click here to learn how to cast their ballots for Paul Vallas, the former CEO of Chicago Public Schools.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61241985/399513029/-479501757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNGQ2ZGVhLTdiZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ROIdb0O3vPdhdx0QbBaXplQh0KiRRPtWhugaE0FudqI=&emci=28415e05-51d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=104d6dea-7bd2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Democrats Serve
55 Beach Shore Drive
Milford, CT 06460
United States

name: SIGN THE LETTER! (via VPP)
subject: Thank DA Bragg for Holding Trump Accountable >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’re OVERJOYED by this news
| **BREAKING: Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg Convinces Grand Jury to Bring Criminal Charges Against Donald Trump** **Listen, this is a HUGE victory for our democracy, so we’re sending Bragg a letter from our top grassroots supporters to thank him for his hard work!** [**We’re sending this letter to his office at 8AM tomorrow – so we only have 105 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42736?t=6&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42736?t=7&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE)
---

TO: DA Alvin Bragg
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you! **_Dear DA Bragg — you’re a HERO!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the immense sense of relief we felt when we saw Trump had been indicted for his crimes!**

Donald Trump has been free to spout his hateful, treasonous rhetoric for years. _Now, he could FINALLY go to jail where he belongs!_

**We know fighting against MAGA extremist threats wasn’t easy — but you still did everything in your power to defend our democracy and hold traitor Trump accountable.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you for holding Trump accountable and to elect Democrats who will stand up for our democracy »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42736?t=8&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42736?t=9&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6872%2E878179%2Ef5BgPE)

clean_body: | | | | Help Requested Peter, You won’t believe this. A recent NBC News article revealed that I am at the TOP of the list of 31 GOP-held seats that Democrats are aggressively targeting in their campaign to regain control of the House majority in 2024. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee have set their sights on us, and they are leaving no stone unturned to ensure that they flip our seats. I have always put the needs of my constituents first, and I have worked tirelessly to make our community a better place to live, work, and raise a family. I am proud of what we have achieved together, and I am determined to continue this important work. But I need YOUR help, Peter, if I’m going to continue serving my OR-05. | | | | | | | I promise you that I will continue to be a strong voice for our community, and I will always stand up for what is right, even when it is not popular. With your help, I am confident that we can win this battle and keep our majority. Thank you for your time, and thank you for standing with me. Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

Don't legitimize this partisan Witch Hunt with your silence!

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zotvbco3jlf29q3kc3qe4s06umgprg5pldqp0le8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdg64ob6cjh2bs "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures before he's arraigned so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

This could be your last chance to add your name before he's arraigned.
**[SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhq2qe2eecr6d8l26l6hlb5s5f5ch1mmd1mcjfh8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdg64ob6cjh2bs "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1qk6icvtse3r2cgm1f5k4d7b3o4kuogaqlpkhi8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdg62oj2chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcvjmvd9oavr3ni3p17drobudr6b3m4dhriofafo_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdg62oj2chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrn4uu8g18mnl62a2jdj7fh9asc264m1pk3uvi48_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdg62oj2chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Take the National Survey on Election Fraud
body:
I’ll bet you’ve heard this one before: voter fraud doesn’t exist

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpounf4av9a824t6gimmnv6g57jtvvm0h5n1adg8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdg66o36c9h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

I'll bet you've heard this one before: _voter fraud doesn 't exist--it's just a ploy._

That's the baseless narrative constantly pushed by Leftists politicians, liberal fanatics, and their mainstream media mouthpiece.

_Apparently,_ election fraud only exists when The Left loses elections. The preposterous hypocrisy of the radical Left simply knows no bounds.

But if election fraud doesn't exist, then why was a Democrat operative arrested late last year for 'widespread voter fraud' in Pennsylvania?

And what about Janet Reed, an Evansville, Indiana, Democratic Party activist, who sent illegally pre-marked absentee ballot applications to voters ahead of the 2020 primary election?

In Arizona, Victor Aguirre, a convicted felon, was charged with illegally voting in the 2020 general election. And in Minnesota, Linda Maria Stately, a convicted felon, was also charged with illegally voting in the 2020 general election.

These are just a few of the _hundreds_ of proven instances of election fraud included in The Heritage Foundation's Election Fraud Database--which recently topped 1,400 cases--ranging from ineligible voting, fraudulent absentee ballots, illegal 'assistance' at the polls, false registrations, and more!

The reality is that voter fraud _does_ exist and it is on the rise, despite the radical Left's attempts to minimize this issue.

And to ensure that this urgent matter is addressed through aggressive reform and oversight, today I'm asking you to join other concerned citizens by completing our [**National Survey on Election Fraud >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2494kaq1frfnilkm5mghk7tadbaaomgd0jf7bs8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdg66o36c9h2bs)

Your answers will help us pressure lawmakers to pursue aggressive oversight and reform and hold those who enable fraud legally accountable.

The survey should only take a minute to complete, but your input is invaluable to this work. You can get started right now using the secure link below: [https://secured.heritage.org/voter-fraud-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2hkd8dojlp910csk9gac6c3g7smjrfpgk13vge0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdg66o36c9h2bs)

Regards,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Today, Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court race will determine whether millions of women become wards of the state, their bodily decisions owned by religious charlatans and right-wing politicians. Your help is urgently needed.
body:
Election Day today!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T690ce0a2-268b-4263-b0d4-1f8b5ad3a4bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_The most important race of the year is today._** _**A race--for the deciding Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin--that will determine whether millions of women become wards of the state, their bodily decisions owned by religious charlatans and right-wing politicians.**_ **_A race that may decide whether criminally indicted, twice-impeached traitor, Donald Trump, can lose the popular vote a third time but just steal the electoral votes he needs to overturn our democracy, like he attempted in 2020._** [**_Right-wing nut Dan Kelly tried to steal Wisconsin's electoral votes for Trump in 2020, and as his attempts to steal this election show, he'll do it again in 2024. Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz as the deciding vote on Wisconsin's Supreme Court, to protect our democracy!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7130430b-71f2-4820-97fe-e244ed249385/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _If there are lingering questions as to whether the Wisconsin Republican Party and their Supreme Court Judge candidate, right-wing bigot Dan Kelly, possess the slightest bit of decency, the question has been answered. _
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99df1487-5584-4952-a43f-47e12445bf0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_This weekend, these power-mad con artists texted a fake alert about REAL TORNADO threats to try and suppress the votes of Democrats supporting pro-choice, democracy champion, Judge Janet Protasiewicz._** Yes, really: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T381de31a-1b0d-42e4-9fe5-78429b289666/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Another sick, new low for a group of criminally corrupt, cruel and incompetent cretins willing to steal power at all costs. | | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

We need 1,000,000 signatures before he's arraigned so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

| | Dear Friend,

subject: Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt Trump indictment...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_"The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

Don't legitimize this partisan Witch Hunt with your silence!

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12b9d12c6cff42dcba312a0ae7251149&_e=IATG9FmucnlUPQtEY8lpiNpAqi0_Q-RAJpawfQ6ccA0YZZoluendpdtVY49GvidHvI6mDCHlraeXwA-yX1BjSMM419S0oQeLu0_kB1994RAxXmxpAG8_mYFyXsYw1tVCIo7dZI89Z8vNaqWUazMHbZwH-evxBNd8vLta3M9RWaV8mIYgI0XHUrxApkRoZnKp0uNlaxIKXGQNE1BH2VqkwGRlRCZxpZnmE0DHzE-BBCWHVtABg4-VY2urvkL7c9R1FE2-cYbZBaETWSQGtxPiGGa1mxTjYAAd14f7x4qiW2pbwaqB5Ogo8qTz3KfSeXG7vF3ObsCKvytCJZWkCL-XzpRGjPtABxuTr8MMDnRBHfdsfkYY8hb8otY0mjlPxj0-fYxhrkEEIiZLDhTIrSBPF5y5lDGHNPlJpNLU1_8GSSyEsGRnTpZBbMfesKB155L7nczf672kFJaF-66vRtbIEQ%3D%3D "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures before he's arraigned so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

This could be your last chance to add your name before he's arraigned.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a87767e85efe49749a5cd6cfb1310493&_e=3OxOC1IK1vzrSdSLsrNN0X9IKx_zwiE2SRqx8y-LZ0vHgk7uQ0V_BqB4w4ZOMpeMGkYIUuZdQfQ_sJEXrMP4ICWdfJVFgZtckxkLq68tatrdrvEVbcBC38FxTDz27FNr4d0NnbJhktOjZhKpnpO_L6SW_Okudsy0UU9dLuWrqn4vTfnQUDGDppoKb1TS9AAO7xYWBPlfVgqyzvot2ii02zON_bB7ZnAC1Ar7pUFP7-HzgUuTi5SP_K1ROYW0c_pw_1c3nC9vjTSpRxKW0HJkk9wwqXZzORmnQjobRHMGg_JDFWriFyu2isHV5O84lwXez5JEYkhmqH0sovaa06bqj_Xv4sX354xRHKGGArDkJ-j60Rco8YBKFYBuWXvNP9Bh4u-p4ZrGpW6t3qaJ0mr6R1722PMLCsp7tInOI6kunoo%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a87767e85efe49749a5cd6cfb1310493&_e=3OxOC1IK1vzrSdSLsrNN0X9IKx_zwiE2SRqx8y-LZ0vHgk7uQ0V_BqB4w4ZOMpeMGkYIUuZdQfQ_sJEXrMP4ICWdfJVFgZtckxkLq68tatrdrvEVbcBC38FxTDz27FNr4d0NnbJhktOjZhKpnpO_L6SW_Okudsy0UU9dLuWrqn4vTfnQUDGDppoKb1TS9AAO7xYWBPlfVgqyzvot2ii02zON_bB7ZnAC1Ar7pUFP7-HzgUuTi5SP_K1ROYW0c_pwwsYi0mRE4h7_MyKO9wtM4T6SdHPLwjLK76qC5OfoZncpip2BKt4dpCAMc9qbXctE8XCr7RMwhvEw7xBUnVWx5aWgmCQ9XeqVa6XC1CTrJTRX3j6PlGgWXXHv_8TOErAH2xbyzc_PjfY5eEm8WjiRApbedvEMGd7ihSc3DIxdn2Y%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a87767e85efe49749a5cd6cfb1310493&_e=3OxOC1IK1vzrSdSLsrNN0X9IKx_zwiE2SRqx8y-LZ0vHgk7uQ0V_BqB4w4ZOMpeMGkYIUuZdQfQ_sJEXrMP4ICWdfJVFgZtckxkLq68tatrdrvEVbcBC38FxTDz27FNr4d0NnbJhktOjZhKpnpO_L6SW_Okudsy0UU9dLuWrqn4vTfnQUDGDppoKb1TS9AAO7xYWBPlfVgqyzvot2ii02zON_bB7ZnAC1Ar7pUFP7-HzgUuTi5SP_K1ROYW0c_pwva0v-4hSCWAcl6AaX27AOka4WSRlROvPVHnpmAQeFzsCkRAvmQlX-Kn16_xkTYknGjDx6kjHOEr6EZVzZSwcgbJZ_Zj5A8f4cfJOohE6zX0kv3YzhMUgZqB_fhbXbYL7kzSGJlb_tnx2anaoo3zsSRSt1cKtm3Tzc-J9D52vIzM%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_"The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

Don't legitimize this partisan Witch Hunt with your silence!

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88ecce2242e344b4af8ac19c38b2acdc&_e=NumsjuCn-22D1zitz6wkf9-XSS4YCM05khl6L0moWTALCFkSHp-D1iaK58JAC0wMjbr4DjwLX-smNPbVL-R4Kns3icptr7T4J_J2V2mvDU9BhaKj4CnF1CH9RgwihDtXIx-aUIKlJe3OkCVF9g7l6vMuTLylQmiF7dEOj84u8oyGvnGScltMGHIcaP6lsE-IWE81TZrdOTCE8ePI-B4mhn9ziGrFQS19MTg3mPkFMEL8W4QFHF3IgH0g301djbxNWDLzlU-mLzgMd4TC1-2I5RgLHBCO8wXxWYA3z9E_miVIuk3dgPiKti0qOkxwe2VvgggoLRbN6gCVpikt1nc60n8TSePWVxOQfJnMLDUWmA21gQJ-lz5UPTw5OhO5QnZyMxXVi76BcTqvXk8IqbRnQwLtXKX0zCsM0agf333FWFX7KG6uKpyBnoJR-8YCqXzszzLClXD7VOWbg41SwI4CLA%3D%3D "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures before he's arraigned so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

This could be your last chance to add your name before he's arraigned.
**[SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88ecce2242e344b4af8ac19c38b2acdc&_e=NumsjuCn-22D1zitz6wkf9-XSS4YCM05khl6L0moWTALCFkSHp-D1iaK58JAC0wMjbr4DjwLX-smNPbVL-R4Kns3icptr7T4J_J2V2mvDU9BhaKj4CnF1CH9RgwihDtXIx-aUIKlJe3OkCVF9g7l6vMuTLylQmiF7dEOj84u8oyGvnGScltMGHIcaP6lsE-IWE81TZrdOTCE8ePI-B4mhn9ziGrFQS19MTg3mPkFMEL8W4QFHF3IgH0g301djbxNWDLzlU-mLzgMd4TC1-2I5RgLHBCO8wXxWYA3z9E_miVIuk3dgPiKti0qOkxwe2VvSfChLj2kSb0kTu6LnrHycXGSC_CgnluSpDA7dTds-FRj44zbiikdT4r0D6QTln7yHwldRKKmyCqElnuR5K2ijnDxptMc_4ky5bYHpQagOxXCbDpc-GNjBagxcO8tZuqog_-xbVxwjN_9ubY2Z4WErg%3D%3D "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

body:
You can watch your video and register for the course below:

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a31a4ea6dc4418ca6120e1c5ce657c2&_e=k5Bu0ojG-DvYrx2gRhC3dLOb0SsW5kViZkfqqbYDjHLpIid4A9lP4-G-CQv-pTeDFh8CYcpKT5US28AdidVw2DzayD1Ta6_ffJtq802ULxb3dPrJMOGQRtWzXBvsUBKTRVNtpsVbp6DtyXfdDIXevkfDHYl3oPUFtVB1tAnnIbboPjR2oAM5If5fiXXyl27h9NhVxs3waQlO_VktqHSZq8X-2QWyHnQA_oC83m6nPtWtDsoAGMEPQHzdRw3iNa5F2PRhBNg_0k3q93JumVQA3MLWEaVI5keLfl2XZW684Puzj6zSKqshTT0LnQANYqaXXZuA47yNBMTM1Di_gv-Xe00Pn9QiUgx2N3tzoyGxadr1N4xwHIb0nQ7pX7o7KZGPA49FOKwqKDbb1fE82CJ7_WiDAfGelzIOVzCVPQDMpFE%3D)

Dear Friend, Hillsdale has a video we'd like to share with you today. It's the trailer for our free online course,** ["C.S. Lewis on Christianity."](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a31a4ea6dc4418ca6120e1c5ce657c2&_e=k5Bu0ojG-DvYrx2gRhC3dLOb0SsW5kViZkfqqbYDjHLpIid4A9lP4-G-CQv-pTeDFh8CYcpKT5US28AdidVw2DzayD1Ta6_ffJtq802ULxb3dPrJMOGQRtWzXBvsUBKTRVNtpsVbp6DtyXfdDIXevkfDHYl3oPUFtVB1tAnnIbboPjR2oAM5If5fiXXyl27h9NhVxs3waQlO_VktqHSZq8X-2QWyHnQA_oC83m6nPtWtDsoAGMEPQHzdRw3iNa5F2PRhBNg_0k3q93JumVQA3BdlwQwtdfAg9GSg3BylCUVqxjP4Z-QAyg411HIQaL1fquu4Fw2kGyk9b2BcJ_GcxhTUoiczC8xbuAoDahshOwWLCS0OFN_abHf2KH_kI1Ce85WcaJF18hsti2_-ZmOcvyJBPkFlSh74hhG7F-mYn4c%3D)** **You can watch your video and register for the course below: ** **_[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/c-s-lewis-on-christianity](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a31a4ea6dc4418ca6120e1c5ce657c2&_e=k5Bu0ojG-DvYrx2gRhC3dLOb0SsW5kViZkfqqbYDjHLpIid4A9lP4-G-CQv-pTeDFh8CYcpKT5US28AdidVw2DzayD1Ta6_ffJtq802ULxb3dPrJMOGQRtWzXBvsUBKTRVNtpsVbp6DtyXfdDIXevkfDHYl3oPUFtVB1tAnnIbboPjR2oAM5If5fiXXyl27h9NhVxs3waQlO_VktqHSZq8X-2QWyHnQA_oC83m6nPtWtDsoAGMEPQHzdRw3iNa5F2PRhBNg_0k3q93JumVQA3FCWLQd9QvNUu1i3nRLna8hL4VcPIhQph0yIYhQkwKCz7Y8SEllTLb4C8-tCcfSf_mMH7ezf-IoH4Se_GlOT_AH3kw3Fr59p7nSUo5Ys6yx6FEnGULOhG8su2s_I77buXFfsQlB8HAh6f-dBiFkmlAQ%3D)_**

| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a31a4ea6dc4418ca6120e1c5ce657c2&_e=k5Bu0ojG-DvYrx2gRhC3dLOb0SsW5kViZkfqqbYDjHLpIid4A9lP4-G-CQv-pTeDFh8CYcpKT5US28AdidVw2DzayD1Ta6_ffJtq802ULxb3dPrJMOGQRtWzXBvsUBKTRVNtpsVbp6DtyXfdDIXevkfDHYl3oPUFtVB1tAnnIbboPjR2oAM5If5fiXXyl27h9NhVxs3waQlO_VktqHSZq8X-2QWyHnQA_oC83m6nPtWtDsoAGMEPQHzdRw3iNa5F2PRhBNg_0k3q93JumVQA3KI2wvC02I5tViCqoiQ4KPIRa5DpQq8G2DwXpWII5bxGTM4kbXNPhODp9IJeHzKr_EgdTra2YkzSLzSdo3AmLfsa-M1r3i7uBDmgkIDAvvleHhwn9MkflmCshx5BzKC59zRKGTa5WHw1coIlCyg-eZE%3D)
---
| | C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him perhaps the most important apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we have produced this course, "C.S. Lewis on Christianity." The goal is to share his profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

But how do you explore the depths of Lewis's writings on these fundamental topics in a seven-lecture course? This is also why we're thrilled to have Dr. Michael Ward--one of the leading scholars of C.S. Lewis--as the instructor for this course. Dr. Ward is a distinguished teaching fellow at Hillsdale College and a professor of theology at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's_ The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! **After watching the trailer, I hope you 'll want to join us and learn from C.S. Lewis by [registering for this free online course](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a31a4ea6dc4418ca6120e1c5ce657c2&_e=k5Bu0ojG-DvYrx2gRhC3dLOb0SsW5kViZkfqqbYDjHLpIid4A9lP4-G-CQv-pTeDFh8CYcpKT5US28AdidVw2DzayD1Ta6_ffJtq802ULxb3dPrJMOGQRtWzXBvsUBKTRVNtpsVbp6DtyXfdDIXevkfDHYl3oPUFtVB1tAnnIbboPjR2oAM5If5fiXXyl27h9NhVxs3waQlO_VktqHSZq8X-2QWyHnQA_oC83m6nPtWtDsoAGMEPQHzdRw3iNa5F2PRhBNg_0k3q93JumVQA3AJLw4Os9SSUb_6zdbDTyyiFj4kyvVJK6isHlqPBrMlL6z-fd_8NwA8tT0pSb5VFxr9yOFM49jZCYsywTcGNnyT4WVE-aMJvvO804WX5IDXGio7q7harI3mveDMl-TiqEpO3a2UDlVi98Q9SmGTXFrw%3D). You can easily do so on the same page as the video****. ** This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of the Christian faith. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis--enjoy your sneak peek! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: You can watch your video and register for the course below: This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Hillsdale has a video we'd like to share with you today. It's the trailer for our free online course, You can watch your video and register for the course below: | | | | C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him perhaps the most important apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we have produced this course, "C.S. Lewis on Christianity." The goal is to share his profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, heaven and hell, and much more. But how do you explore the depths of Lewis's writings on these fundamental topics in a seven-lecture course? This is also why we're thrilled to have Dr. Michael Ward--one of the leading scholars of C.S. Lewis--as the instructor for this course. Dr. Ward is a distinguished teaching fellow at Hillsdale College and a professor of theology at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! After watching the trailer, I hope you 'll want to join us and learn from C.S. Lewis by . You can easily do so on the same page as the video**. This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of the Christian faith. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis--enjoy your sneak peek! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | | | | | | | Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

**That's why it's so important to show that Democrats are still standing with our president in the fight to move our country forward. We're counting on top Democrats to respond to our live poll before midnight tonight — and your response is still missing, friend:**

Friend: During his two years in the Oval Office so far, President Biden has delivered historic progress for our country — passing a comprehensive gun safety reform package, confirming Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court, creating millions of new jobs and more.
**But now, President Biden is facing a GOP-controlled House majority — filled with extremists who are hell-bent on obstructing his agenda and pushing their dangerous policies as we head into a new election cycle.**
**That's why it's so important for Democrats to come together to show that we're standing united behind President Biden. But time is running out before our poll closes at midnight, and we still need another 36 responses from your area — including yours.**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: The western bumble bee has vanished from 8 states
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Bees are dying at alarming rates. Donate $27 or more now and help us reach our $2,310 goal before midnight!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704918?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704919?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704920?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704921?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Imagine walking into the grocery store just to see empty shelves where there used to be a variety of your favorite fruits, veggies, and nuts. This could one day be our reality if **bees and other pollinators continue dying at alarming rates.[Act now before it’s too late for bees and the planet: Donate $27 or more immediately and help us reach our $2,310 goal before midnight tonight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704922?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Neonicotinoid pesticides -- produced by companies like Bayer-Monsanto -- are a key driver of pollinator declines. But they’re still widely used in agriculture. What’s more, the EPA could approve them for another 15 years -- _**but pollinators don’t have 15 years to wait for us to ban neonics.**_
There’s no time to waste, Friend: scientists are calling the massive loss of pollinators and other insects an “insect apocalypse” with dire risks for our food system and the planet. **40% of insect pollinator species are at risk of extinction.** We have to act fast to ban the pesticides contributing to this crisis before the damage is irreversible.
**Help save bees, pollinators, and our planet. Donate $27 or more today to help us reach our $2,310 goal before midnight!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704918?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704919?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704920?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704921?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The American bumblebee population has plummeted by 89% in the last two decades, **nearly vanishing from eight states already**. Meanwhile, bee-killing pesticides -- neonics -- have made U.S. agriculture nearly 48 times more toxic to insects.
Neonics hurt people, too. _**They have been linked to health impacts like birth defects of the heart and brain, hormone disruption, and autism.**_
Bees that encounter neonics can face horrible fates. The pesticides can _**kill bees on contact.**_ But even if they survive, the toxic chemicals can attack bees’ nerve cells and can harm their cognition, flight ability, and even reproduction.
Now, the EPA could approve these bee-killing neonics for another 15 years and subject even more bees to this fate.
Why is the EPA dragging its feet on banning neonics? Perhaps because pesticide giants like Bayer-Monsanto continue to funnel big money into disinformation efforts -- all to deny and distract from the role that their products play in bee deaths.
But together, we can counter the disinformation, speak louder than the pesticide industry, and push for stronger pollinator protections.
**Stop companies like Bayer-Monsanto from harming pollinators and destroying our planet: Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704918?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704919?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704920?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704921?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are an essential part of our ecosystem and way of life. Without bees and other pollinators, we’d have far fewer fruits, veggies, and nuts -- **almonds wouldn’t even exist at all.** And other crops like coffee and cotton could become rare or more expensive if bees continue to decline.
If we don’t act now to ban bee-killing pesticides, today’s children could be some of the last people to share the planet with many species of wild bees.
With you by our side, we’re pushing the EPA to ban neonics once and for all. We’re asking big supermarket chains to stop selling foods grown with bee-toxic pesticides and increase organic offerings -- which will shift the market away from these chemicals. And we’re working with Congress and at the state and local level to ban neonics and other bee-toxic pesticides. At the same time, we’re researching and shining a light on Big Ag’s disinformation tactics to make sure decision-makers know the truth about the toxic way we produce food. But it’s an uphill battle -- one we can’t win without you.
We won’t stand by and let corporate greed trump the health of pollinators, people, and the planet. With your membership support today, we can double down on these efforts and give pollinators a fighting chance! Please, Friend, will you donate $27 or more today and help us reach our $2,310 goal for pollinators and the planet?
**Bees, people, and the planet are on the line. Rush your $27 donation and help us reach our $2,310 goal before midnight tonight!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704918?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704919?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704920?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704921?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Chairman James Comer
subject: Peter, Alvin Bragg has a lot of explaining to do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

---
| | |
Peter, Alvin Bragg has a lot of explaining to do.

It's Oversight Chairman James Comer.

_**Make no mistake: this political prosecution of Donald Trump is an attack on American democracy. **_

I'm doing everything I can to hold this radical Soros backed DA accountable, but I need your help.
---
| | | [DEMAND ACCOUNTABILITY ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62518708:JbxJcxGN-:m:1:3365131770:030BFE445BE315B0ED6944C31F1A1372:r "Generic Button")
---
If they can do this to President Trump, just imagine what they have planned for you and me.

name: Don Huffines
subject: My plan for term limits in Texas...
body:
Term limits are citizens’ best defense against career politicians and the Austin Swamp.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-fuldllt-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuldllt-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuldllt-yuddtktydi-y/)
### _" If you have a 95% chance of winning reelection, why would you care about what your constituents want?"_
Term limits are citizens' best defense against career politicians and the Austin Swamp. Without term limits, our elected officeholders will always have a deaf ear to the voters.As a Texas Senator, I filed legislation that would have implemented term limits. Please take a moment to read our [latest paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuldllt-yuddtktydi-j/) arguing for why we need term limits in Texas.For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always,Don Huffines [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuldllt-yuddtktydi-t/)

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: About the emails you’ve been getting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson**
body:
There’s a lot of fakers out there. A lot of people who claim to like Trump| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this [link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=3dd739063c674141ac3a6d226f00625b&_t=F4dz2cg4no6JuFi-bA_StvaZshuOZyUXu2jdLmUeOhkXn45BmLvGzd9HbCBoV9LSA3VP39a8qFyhDs7jJ2IbbEdjBzMdqeSnaVLVFQUXNYw%3D).
---
| | This is President Trump’s strongest ally in the House, Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I’m sure you’ve gotten a ton of messages about President Trump’s indictment, but the sad truth is that most people sending these texts don’t support President Trump at all.
They haven’t endorsed him, and behind closed doors, they absolutely hate his guts.
It’s despicable. It’s a shameless cash grab that bullies grassroots conservatives like YOU into donating to RINO’s who actively work against our best interests.
**I was President Trump’s White House physician.**
**I endorsed President Trump the day he announced his candidacy.**
**And I’m proudly the leader among House members on his Texas leadership team.**
I’ll never abandon President Trump, because he stood with us to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
But the sad news is that yesterday was my first fundraising deadline of the year, and I missed my goal. I missed it big time.

clean_body: There’s a lot of fakers out there. A lot of people who claim to like Trump| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this . | | This is President Trump’s strongest ally in the House, Congressman Ronny Jackson. I’m sure you’ve gotten a ton of messages about President Trump’s indictment, but the sad truth is that most people sending these texts don’t support President Trump at all. They haven’t endorsed him, and behind closed doors, they absolutely hate his guts. It’s despicable. It’s a shameless cash grab that bullies grassroots conservatives like YOU into donating to RINO’s who actively work against our best interests. I was President Trump’s White House physician. I endorsed President Trump the day he announced his candidacy. And I’m proudly the leader among House members on his Texas leadership team. I’ll never abandon President Trump, because he stood with us to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! But the sad news is that yesterday was my first fundraising deadline of the year, and I missed my goal. I missed it big time. The Never-Trump swamp that pretends to support Trump hates me. I refuse to take a dime of their money, but because of that, I need support from patriots like you now more than ever. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: We're still fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
The Left is watching how we are responding in the days following the announcement of this indictment. |
---

Fellow American,

Now that President Donald Trump has been arraigned, I keep thinking how shocking it is that this weaponization of the rule of law is _actually_ taking place in the United States.

Democrats have been threatened by President Trump's political power for years, but now they've stooped to a new low. This is their attempt to silence him, knock him down, and eliminate him from contention before the 2024 campaign jumps into high gear. They know Joe Biden stands no chance in a rematch, and they don't want to risk Republicans taking control of the House, the Senate, **and** the White House.

I'm going to be on with Sean Hannity again tonight to discuss what happened today in Manhattan and why it is critical that we support President Trump now.

Since Thursday night, I've heard from thousands of members of Team Graham who support President Trump and his fight against this rogue Democrat District Attorney. **I want Team Graham to step up today so we can show President Trump we have his back.**

[**Fellow American, you are one of Team Graham's biggest champions. Will you show your support to President Trump with a split contribution to Team Graham and Trump Save America of just $5 before I go live with Hannity?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61668967:Wz3VchDNB:m:1:877327319:AC5C494EA01D034CB9C43AF77A1DF654:r)

The Left is watching how we are responding in the days following the announcement of this indictment. They think this will divide us and defeat us, but I'm seeing firsthand that this has just reinvigorated our fight. [**So please, Fellow American, show your support of President Trump right now before I go live.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61668967:Wz3VchDNB:m:1:877327319:AC5C494EA01D034CB9C43AF77A1DF654:r)

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61668967:Wz3VchDNB:m:1:877327319:AC5C494EA01D034CB9C43AF77A1DF654:r)
Lindsey Graham

body:

---
## Trump In Court
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20246442.11623.1.9e8152aa1b8e2c17ae9385821de8c0a9)
---
Today, is one the **saddest days in American history**.
Before our very eyes, we are seeing the downfall of our Republic.
In America, **we do not arrest our political opponents**... _until now_.
**President Donald Trump** has been arraigned and is in court as we speak.
I have been in communication with many on the Trump team and the President is staying strong.
The request is that we would pray that **President Trump** would be surrounded with Godly counsel in the days ahead.
Please join me and thousands of Pastors in praying that and praying for our nation.
Here is how you can help:

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:
Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Serve America and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

subject: Election day is TODAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
We are counting on you one last time!
| Peter,
---
Election Day is TODAY and all of our hard work comes down to this moment.
---
**Radical Judge Protasiewicz is a criminal-first, far-left judicial activist who promised to reverse all the common sense reforms Wisconsin has made in the last decade.**
---
_If she wins, she will throw out the current legislative maps to give Democrats an advantage and ultimately another 4 years in the White House._
---
Protasiewicz has a record of putting her politics ahead of the law and safety of Wisconsinites, and she will continue this dangerous practice if she wins.
---
**We can 't let her win and destroy the future of Wisconsin and this country.**
---
_We need your help one last time in these final moments to ensure that we get every conservative voter to the polls._
---
[**So please, make an urgent, last-minute contribution TODAY to ensure we get every last conservative voter to the polls to defend our conservative majority and our great state from the radical Left.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62518829:J6dHaxGIN:m:1:3365131770:A6893F3A7930DFBC9100F88D71BB3D4E:r)
---

Thank you,
---
Wisconsin Republicans

With just 3 days left until Election Day, we can't slow down our efforts to spread our winning message and ensure conservative voters cast their ballots.

_Liberal voter turnout exceeded conservatives in the primary earlier this year._

_But with your continued support and the future of our great state at stake, we know that conservatives will**out-vote** the Left for a conservative win._

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15b03b95d0674c5e934313b8959a60c0&_e=sTTQV_SuNyHnrb_s1vmc9GqPFtNrD3z18bJhHBMxzCiZr4Ucc9Oxw9WaYqpYVt8fATLPvMrqXOZ5bl7eNu0LEXHL-JPLz0uSlTCBx4YJT0JqNlqNxIm2Lr454JZ02OPDHX2u9foYQOVTn7IEuokhQwZDan8oyBGChTBral7tWf9NjNby-cF8EVt8Vh8Njqrs7H-4QAlRuLKhEbFKs1cdfwCmrFHs-h8-fc4gMU7LWkWyiZB41YZWR4jaky2MzFd3baDAX5Ro6uAlw8HduyatTmf9kmLENjVA9k6bVOv5cRmEkhHxjLRYwbv0_l4wM-cgdaiy03Dff8tFTTfPUPeMziGGAUXz9KBdgPLDDPbCqEjsYUWMsHVlf64SumIaQYkzEq1pWiWTlrDqQo1yRVS3vZ1cv0lkKqXXXOiu135jVew%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15b03b95d0674c5e934313b8959a60c0&_e=sTTQV_SuNyHnrb_s1vmc9GqPFtNrD3z18bJhHBMxzCiZr4Ucc9Oxw9WaYqpYVt8fATLPvMrqXOZ5bl7eNu0LEXHL-JPLz0uSlTCBx4YJT0JqNlqNxIm2Lr454JZ02OPDHX2u9foYQOVTn7IEuokhQwZDan8oyBGChTBral7tWf9NjNby-cF8EVt8Vh8Njqrs7H-4QAlRuLKhEbFKs1cdfwCmrFHs-h8-fc4gMU7LWkWyiZB41YZWR4jaky2MzFd3baDAX5Ro6uAlw8HduyatTjrogxWhKah79m_Ss4y9y-EzN1P_bXFKwaALKbzYh7MV29JHouli9gj_V2j59sw5o53vFdMRR29C-ymampqypbm7LDaNniWLuqxW6Vtoz-ENXlpNALrJB1TKqPOIsbwUOAQx4C-_my7XzCjiB_7HZaw%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

Don't legitimize this partisan Witch Hunt with your silence!

This could be your last chance to add your name before he's arraigned.

| | According to new data from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, Americans' average life expectancy shortened by over seven months last year. That decrease follows an already significant decline of 1.8 years in 2020. As a result, the expected lifespan of someone born in the U.S. is now 76.4 years — the shortest in nearly two decades. Why?
* Deterioration of Public Health
* Broken Medical Care System
* Individual Behaviors (Diet & Tobacco)
* Social Factors (Poverty & Inequality)
* Public Policies and Values

A big part of the difference between life and death in the U.S. and its peer countries is people dying or killed before age 50 through diseases of despair - suicide, drug overdoses, and violence. Can we do something about this? Yes.Should we do something about this? Yes.Is the data below the best we can do? No.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6cOTB_zbg/c?w=7-Dw68DefI7NUEfS5J3cRmBOgnYAo7ZiFuJZ6iJWguk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImU5YzVlMGQ5LTI5MGEtNDFlNy1iMDlmLTJmYjdhMDk5NjgzMSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
| | Congress has 170+ lawyers and 80+ veterans representing districts on the Hill, but not one trusted family physician, neither a Democrat nor a Republican. When nearly 30% of our federal budget is on medical care expenses, we need a “Doctor in the House” to lead reform.
When the Nation suffers from diseases of despair — drugs, alcohol, suicide, and a mental health crisis — my life’s work and my training as a social worker, in public health, an addiction specialist, and a family physician can serve a greater purpose in Congress.[To get there, I need you in my corner today.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6cOTB_zbg/c?w=5DnijwAt5G87sREF8keTmSQYP1NVt-L9ZgeE3rWkUg8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JpdC5seS9GdW5kRHJCb2IiLCJyIjoiNzRlYzQ5ZGYtOWJkNC00ODlmLWE1NmUtNzE3NTUxYmM4ZWFmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
[Can you chip in today](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6cOTB_zbg/c?w=5DnijwAt5G87sREF8keTmSQYP1NVt-L9ZgeE3rWkUg8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JpdC5seS9GdW5kRHJCb2IiLCJyIjoiNzRlYzQ5ZGYtOWJkNC00ODlmLWE1NmUtNzE3NTUxYmM4ZWFmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) to help me fight for a publicly-funded, non-profit, national health insurance program that will fully cover medical costs for all Americans and reduce wasteful medical expenses? Americans are spending too much on healthcare. Your bills are too high. We need to spend more time treating patients than we do billing them.
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrhekgkae7aiqhv7r4mrk7eo2qne58fsekn61pm0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh62o32cph2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdun08qe62k811kg7b5c187pkcq1haorf9bfbrj8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh62o32cph2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs3ge0dnbo3n18vss7lim8v35bqjbinlbuabc90g_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh62o32cph2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9vpn0v3qbaoop1j9sd91f05e9d9qh0g8j5asin0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh62o32cph2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

body:
The Democrats' end game has been EXPOSED...

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Peter,
The radical Left's end game is clear.
Soros believes that with his hand-picked D.A. - Alvin Bragg - having **INDICTED** me for committing __no__ __crime__ , they can bleed our campaign dry by dragging us through witch hunt after witch hunt.
But what the Democrats never fail to underestimate about our incredible movement is **YOU**...
_...The more than 74 MILLION American patriots who REFUSE to allow our great country to become a third world nation._
No matter how many vicious witch hunts they subject us to, we will not bend, we will not break, and we will NEVER stop standing up for TRUE JUSTICE - an America where the PEOPLE are put FIRST, not the Swamp creatures, globalist special interests, or the powers that be.
But because they know I can never be bought, bullied, or controlled, the attacks will never stop.
Our ONLY choice is to fend off each and every witch hunt they throw our way.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Today’s race for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court seat tomorrow may decide whether our democracy ends up falling into the abyss in 2024. Your support matters.
body:
Election Day alert!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd8d63fd-7b76-4000-8cca-066c01de7aa1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Dan Kelly's a threat to democracy. Full stop. Today he’s on the ballot to become the deciding vote on Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court. The polls will still be open for a few, crucial hours where we have the chance to help drive additional voter turnout._** **_[We must elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz to Wisconsin's Supreme Court.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td12be98c-2935-4720-b492-fe633e6b9db0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It will provide a 4-3 majority to save our democracy from Trump's electoral theft & ensure millions of women control their bodies, not zealots & demagogues._** _* Please read this to understand how close we came to the abyss in 2020:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdab2ff24-550d-404f-a4b2-26ba22e2ebc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**ONE VOTE. We were one vote from authoritarian catastrophe.**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3e29529-11fa-4e03-ab3b-24c2af4c864d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_The 4th vote, after today, will be either Janet Protasiewicz, or Dan Kelly, the Trump-endorsed member of his "election integrity tour," the GOP effort to convince key officials in swing states to steal electoral votes for Trump._** [**_Dan Kelly's a cancer on our democracy. Janet Protasiewicz will help us heal and protect it.__ If you ever thought about a time to reach deep, this is it._** **_Please join Blue Amp, in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to save equality & democracy._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03a2a99f-76f6-4822-b15d-46ec7e549bdd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for not sitting on the sidelines for the most important race this year._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72b7f639-d428-46c0-98dd-232c5e927574/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

---|---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/protasiewiczelectionday-wisupremecourt-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T566b4813-057a-4c71-bdbd-23345f2afe38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt Trump indictment...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

Don't legitimize this partisan Witch Hunt with your silence!

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq0ncofu73flkuuvendndrv4ashi64dpa37i3q28_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh66pr1cdh2bs "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures before he's arraigned so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

This could be your last chance to add your name before he's arraigned.
**[SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc02mni6ebrki1ctea96jntjrmqotaj04adk4bh8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh66pr1cdh2bs "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Here’s your sneak peek
body:
You can watch your video and register for the course below:

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdf5a202mqk6nf64t1adp1145i0364l57k4809p0_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh69ob2cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, Hillsdale has a video we'd like to share with you today. It's the trailer for our free online course,** ["C.S. Lewis on Christianity."](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0niq3irn3dfsaii92hv7ohv53fsakpre4ka0qt8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh69ob2cph2bs)** **You can watch your video and register for the course below: ** **_[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/c-s-lewis-on-christianity](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg2un8v1vg3manlarm7hl5sok255gfrkkc691nr8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh69ob2cph2bs)_**
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zebrg9guvrm619qnv47n9gn4mttcl3hbs6agdrro_rp22sh2s8i66o70cdh69ob2cph2bs)
---
| | C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him perhaps the most important apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we have produced this course, "C.S. Lewis on Christianity." The goal is to share his profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

But how do you explore the depths of Lewis's writings on these fundamental topics in a seven-lecture course? This is also why we're thrilled to have Dr. Michael Ward--one of the leading scholars of C.S. Lewis--as the instructor for this course. Dr. Ward is a distinguished teaching fellow at Hillsdale College and a professor of theology at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's_ The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! **After watching the trailer, I hope you 'll want to join us and learn from C.S. clean_body: You can watch your video and register for the course below: This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Hillsdale has a video we'd like to share with you today. It's the trailer for our free online course, You can watch your video and register for the course below: | | | | C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him perhaps the most important apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we have produced this course, "C.S. Lewis on Christianity." The goal is to share his profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, heaven and hell, and much more. But how do you explore the depths of Lewis's writings on these fundamental topics in a seven-lecture course? This is also why we're thrilled to have Dr. Michael Ward--one of the leading scholars of C.S. Lewis--as the instructor for this course. Dr. Ward is a distinguished teaching fellow at Hillsdale College and a professor of theology at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! After watching the trailer, I hope you 'll want to join us and learn from C.S. Lewis by . You can easily do so on the same page as the video**. This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of the Christian faith. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis--enjoy your sneak peek! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | | | | | | | Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Today, voters are headed to the polls to elect a new Supreme Court justice -- and the end result will have big implications in the state for years to come. **The choice for voters is clear:** Judge Janet Protasiewicz believes in fair electoral maps, defending voting rights, and protecting access to abortion. Her opponent, Dan Kelly, is too extreme for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court. He will make it harder for patients to access reproductive health care, put doctors at risk of prosecution, and threaten our democracy. **The DNC is pouring resources into get-out-the-vote efforts for Wisconsin right now, Derek. clean_body: Today, voters are headed to the polls to elect a new Supreme Court justice -- and the end result will have big implications in the state for years to come. | | Derek, there is an incredibly consequential election happening in Wisconsin. Today, voters are headed to the polls to elect a new Supreme Court justice -- and the end result will have big implications in the state for years to come. The choice for voters is clear: Judge Janet Protasiewicz believes in fair electoral maps, defending voting rights, and protecting access to abortion. Her opponent, Dan Kelly, is too extreme for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court. He will make it harder for patients to access reproductive health care, put doctors at risk of prosecution, and threaten our democracy. The DNC is pouring resources into get-out-the-vote efforts for Wisconsin right now, Derek. The finish line is within our sights, and we can’t give up until we run through the tape. We’ll get you updates as soon as we can. Thanks for checking in, The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **.
