name: Jim Renacci
subject: ICYMI: It's time to stop the Vote Raiders in Ohio! Secore our Elections!
body:
I was on the Radio with Bob Frantz last wee.....
| |
---
**ICYMI: Jim Renacci Explains Why Ohio Needs a Closed Primary** **on Always Right Radio with Bob Frantz**
_"Republicans should pick Republicans, Democrats should pick Democrats."_

Always Right Radio host Bob Frantz, who says he supports the effort to close Ohio's primary "lividly and enthusiastically," invited Jim Renacci onto the show to discuss his recent op-ed and explain why the state needs to act now to enforce its primary voting rules.

You can [listen to the full interview here](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxUkUGPmzAQhX_NcAvCY8eGA4dNaQ6RopVaVZX2goztDa5s4wWzhP76ioRW6vX7Rk_vaaSPzr6vNYgTIPZWT4AI9AUQ2fpy_dYf13g8fFzuBxn8183hF0BMazT_DveM3Hhp3UZFk-mad5XmmakJLwtOjrykWV9XFJU2BpGLEgXBignxbpjgSCgruy6zNRZIC1YwQhlBkheEyo6L7qhUxbBUwAqf_7J-NEEqZXM1-MzVfUpxerQ5A56XZcnXYU5zZza_EZlUD_T8CbSh7St_u75qdboB8jn51httZw-02Rc84DTMozJAm6Bcu0_clZI-SnsLQJtn14Nyw2R0G0fr5WjN9PdwCMmE9Aw5hOuPz_slfu9OgLwNzupN_A8fH6DNx-U-v_3-mY21jot1zk5cACtuW79t0p8AAAD__4vOiTE) and check out a few excerpts below:

"I was actually with a Democrat, speaking with him, and we were talking about this subject...and he said to me, 'Jim, I like the idea of being able to come over, especially in Ohio, and make decisions for Republicans, because the Democrats don't have a bench, so I know the Democrats aren't going to win so I like to actually cross over and make the decisions...' That is the problem. Democrats are making decisions for Republicans."

"Let's enforce the law. Let's stop the raiding of our primary system. Let's require people to make a decision either thirty days in advance or by December 31 like a lot of other states are doing, and then we'll stop the crossover votes."

"We went from almost 3 million registered Republicans, and now we're back to 1.9 million registered Republicans in 2022...that shows you, not only did they cross-over, but they crossed back. And again, this is why they call it raiding."

clean_body: I was on the Radio with Bob Frantz last wee..... | | ICYMI: Jim Renacci Explains Why Ohio Needs a Closed Primary on Always Right Radio with Bob Frantz "Republicans should pick Republicans, Democrats should pick Democrats." Always Right Radio host Bob Frantz, who says he supports the effort to close Ohio's primary "lividly and enthusiastically," invited Jim Renacci onto the show to discuss his recent op-ed and explain why the state needs to act now to enforce its primary voting rules. You can and check out a few excerpts below: "I was actually with a Democrat, speaking with him, and we were talking about this subject...and he said to me, 'Jim, I like the idea of being able to come over, especially in Ohio, and make decisions for Republicans, because the Democrats don't have a bench, so I know the Democrats aren't going to win so I like to actually cross over and make the decisions...' That is the problem. Democrats are making decisions for Republicans." "Let's enforce the law. Let's stop the raiding of our primary system. Let's require people to make a decision either thirty days in advance or by December 31 like a lot of other states are doing, and then we'll stop the crossover votes." "We went from almost 3 million registered Republicans, and now we're back to 1.9 million registered Republicans in 2022...that shows you, not only did they cross-over, but they crossed back. And again, this is why they call it raiding." ONE LAST REMINDER: There are about Two Dozen Tickets left to our 2023 Lincoln Day Dinner with Ben Carson in Wadsworth, OH!! We expect them all to be gone by Wednesday or Thursday! Don't wait another second to get yours! Visit an buy online or call 330-603-8366 | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 www.JimRenacci.com

# **$1 Million Raised in Q1**
In 3 short months, hundreds of people have invested in our vision and we raised more than $1 million this first quarter - one of the largest fundraising quarters in district history.

Their support - **YOUR support** \- strongly positions us to continue our fight to preserve the American Dream for all! _From becoming the first naturalized Mexican-American citizen to represent the state of Arizona in Congress,_

_To delivering the GOP’s response to President Biden’s State of the Union in Spanish,_

_To nominating and voting for Speaker Kevin McCarthy,_

_To serving in the U.S. House Committee on Appropriations,_

_To introducing bipartisan legislation aimed to benefit veterans by cutting VA wait times and permanently authorizing the U.S. VET-TEC Program,_

_To establishing a bipartisan citizen’s advisory council,_

_To presiding over the U.S. House Floor,_

_And now raising over $1 million to secure this seat and fight for our district._

**It's been an INCREDIBLE first 3 months. **

I’m so grateful for the outpouring of support and investment, and remain committed to representing our district - Arizona's 6th congressional district - in Congress.

**THANK YOU!** 🇺🇸

Juan

disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9ugPsoMaZ167qAYFq0MUMUTiZHWEG7kWuCtWBuaKuJFCixyj9vbFY7pK1hVI99-YPGahQqKhugNpGAYC0biRVbyp32sTy7qAPNee1lVIt-iTEEhP8FBh0HCjT5FUKXSmDVRGvgn_hf9VaNQI_xq_S7TNZ3Q1W2R4fplh-TEQj4K6u)
---
Welcome back to **Hillbilly on the Hill** , a glance into Senator Vance's work in Washington and around Ohio!

Senator Vance has been keeping busy fighting for Ohio.

Check out some of the headlines about him over the past few weeks. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9useU6o6zAokkZ-dTzg7HGpqpOp703-HC1h7ZWPl56yg9l-22sqoJCiaURyWEeM6s0Y0mMhBw_8eENibT04Fw_hNjGjeAvYEL_T6MxhDis_rklVjNW_1TwZAIDpDcBGsCF5bldoDpWeiW-o0ZBXt-H02D-net29jC9vGQw_PzMe1SGq35zUVmYP8n7QZQoBNt3XoeZPC8vXLv27Xt0KDgjvKBeMWVpeipOefEsN42c6Z5cQbsCpAhnt5i-m8cLmR0WBODqBoB7xLHPc97VO__7GWhd9z5JRgNhPEkAh_aRJkf) **' IT'S TIME FOR CHOOSING. LET'S MAKE THE RIGHT ONE'** (**[Highland County Press](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9useU6o6zAokkZ-dTzg7HGpqpOp703-HC1h7ZWPl56yg9l-22sqoJCiaURyWEeM6s0Y0mMhBw_8eENibT04Fw_hNjGjeAvYEL_T6MxhDis_rklVjNW_1TwZAIDpDcBGsCF5bldoDpWeiW-o0ZBXt-H01dbyKf5YXaipP7YHjEJoscODvnQ3oNntrh-dB1xY6l3SdcFByoPWsuPv_wcamqHLGf3ENr1XY5OA0HP-Uywe1ofy9J-uxvgm4zBc5ec9OV9qB_Is0RS34khoyuM8xaAAoKXGQTMdY3O5rbLPX7VqGF)**) - Senator Vance penned an Op-ed urging passage of his bill that would hold Norfolk Southern accountable for its train derailment in East Palestine.

"You cannot claim special government privileges, you cannot ask the government to bail you out, and then resist basic public safety.

"We are the party of firefighters, of police officers, of the people who go to work, pay their taxes, fight our country's wars, and keep our communities safe. We are proud of that and we should be proud of that in the Republican Party.

"I believe that we are the party of working people, but it's time to be the party of working people. We have a choice. Are we for big business and big government or are we for the people of East Palestine?" wrote Senator Vance.

_Read Senator Vance 's full article [here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9useU6o6zAokkZ-dTzg7HGpqpOp703-HC1h7ZWPl56yg9l-22sqoJCiaURyWEeM6s0Y0mMhBw_8eENibT04Fw_hNjGjeAvYEL_T6MxhDis_rklVjNW_1TwZAIDpDcBGsCF5bldoDpWeiW-o0ZBXt-H02Y308TS58lekzQKTDZXAR36wpTTDX1sTeviT5SHAki-AZV2GiRcT1WSZlUYLKBF5kkhxTp6AwhshUHvAD7zbM-w25xlggV71lM_clRVLJWugkV3SfSqq6Ddxo3YifWJGL1iyi1BF2zHJXHaGdgA58D)_ [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9ukrgn5NG6F_Np0d0x8iyKaf7jq8JrND7x18pcL72wThGCR5G7B1KQ9AkHUnSlKS7d4r4r14nsL0a3IBeZ2F7wz1DRmR2-rikC6lr7B-ERmw-gVmR3l4yh5aSnCbuvpGiFnxN0l02L4bwBUWVDHh0XBlRoiFJvbpaKmimRQ3bZyCr1MbEkaGJ8n0o0vhJ3RHcc_Fp6_nFZG6hwUDw_5Bjoin-GBxuIG2raDF-aLmzQMMS9vVYz0Fcq0u3ZyO0rf3GEg%3D%3D) The [Spectator Magazine](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9ukrgn5NG6F_Np0d0x8iyKaf7jq8JrND7x18pcL72wThGCR5G7B1KQ9AkHUnSlKS7d4r4r14nsL0a3IBeZ2F7wz0bbHzzYpvBXdIZxXPaJg2Ro6DgQVaeMe1s_IMAsOAwIWQAQ2Z_mO-EJ6Et63a-a2f-iEcIOoOX0pnkYZmDzqMTcILGueH4W6hG50DyJmnjHUQrICxQOPwFfzb-LRH8TFg33e82peuzLIQq9wp5yoXCSHGKo5WtlPEFkGrL-JosJQ%3D%3D) covered Senator Vance's first few months in office:_ "His first months in office have surprised everyone -- except those who know him"_

In embracing the principles of his homeland, Vance is "making major progress for the ideology he represents...The Republican party and conservative movement are changing, and all signs point to him being able to deliver." [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9uhl-TXetYeTjIFIXNPTlYVCdiFNNQRSSio7Vokx1ViF_GCH87q1YS_IkiQmPrZ-RcXAoyZEPxIHquTITXYwXAmIJJrDFS9uVz8N4VpYz5W4idnO1RxEG0XN9EBZDwLTbZfsmgGPoKsNzHAyf8MoVIsasR_b4WIl7TbAmc4LCkGvkZHvHciVjxrrKm8HfKEg3I6NymjytaPqoubGI3xsnowtTGxS_-RZMz6lxbJ0K6Jp4UtoMT0F6MCqicxhKGigUmw%3D%3D) **' THIS COMMONSENSE LEGISLATION RECOGNZES AN INHERENT TRUTH'** ([Washington Examiner](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9uhl-TXetYeTjIFIXNPTlYVCdiFNNQRSSio7Vokx1ViF_GCH87q1YS_IkiQmPrZ-RcXAoyZEPxIHquTITXYwXAmIJJrDFS9uVz8N4VpYz5W4ijId7GKEPSfQrvORNwEU-EEb3M30b0GujdvBZAMlmHvCEh5bJma-Y1_fHpz8fmL7W2qKHqGi5V3LrnmurdUaF2TIK8cTPVJDIScM5eQlDxx9GUwbAy946kI_CABr_HJ79PKEfpyGQY4uaXgv7prfiqA%3D%3D)) - Senator Vance introduced a bill last week that would designate English as the official language of the United States.

"The English language has been a cornerstone of American culture for over 250 years. It is far past time for Congress to codify its place into law, which is exactly what this bill does," said Vance. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9utHZFR42w8y-plGjZz0xuclrAKtCzOm5OzIHLsAmV0tuUo1KytEfqOdRXE0NuaCRoEz3iEBKjHa_gerpjhDZr-vjEXLeBxkBaBnlZxrsnZPR1WdTNnvU9XTWTGbS0R3uZuVSAxK993tNhGXe-F0hFxWbl_dTJB1DDhniJBnLSAi7OC1r6g6rzqV9gDlpvaL0tF8Dxkl3l2m7cjB2ZV-ixNY%3D) **' THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION HAS BEEN RESISTANT TO BE HONEST WITH US'** ([Fox News' Tucker Carlson](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9utHZFR42w8y-plGjZz0xuclrAKtCzOm5OzIHLsAmV0tuUo1KytEfqOdRXE0NuaCRoI2zm7W2lvLKtJ8FkihkJcCTlN2fIg7TlCOp6WjJ40FvVl84x01GnzZ_BqaIrTxCdGiUDKUMsuIK1eOiBk5kntxtdP917CAoq3uZb-YdJZlbIxVDu--0xtYDBxzjfrPKqlgPbFs7yrpuN2pK3Hrg5DQ%3D)) - Senator Vance joined Tucker Carlson to discuss the lack of accountability in hundreds of billions of dollars the United States is sending to Ukraine.

_Watch Senator Vance 's full interview:_ [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9utHZFR42w8y-plGjZz0xuclrAKtCzOm5OzIHLsAmV0tuUo1KytEfqOdRXE0NuaCRoBOxHr5X5PXeKKhMiTO5Eymk5Q15xJbwkfBV85_l-E8aKNVhIPSQQ0IsuH7lb-r8FARG_kGxqDEYzHLSuRqCEmbLIqg5kBZ8B3hhLJXybvz28DagRvQMPMxJXTmese_zfd1P26QdGVNtavfgFxj7KWQ%3D)[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9utHZFR42w8y-plGjZz0xucn3RD3BM1mDMocJIVw0C5OYLijcrE9GxWmHxwmU0QvR7feuj86qhVq9Zue41C7jpWIdohPeMG1eZ_IWIuHwZz-lhqj-pBpdvborHqIi6mxdhAKbHoBjqrVMWjIGOd_IjNJvjA1dWMwBvirsVW0oWmZIkRUNJc_E28tTYZDu8xveoevR7LqU7JfWkDeRS3iryZ2k2DifLe20Ct_A1VWpzeiWzOEhR5TQEYi5A5E-NEmpcA%3D%3D) **' TOXIC CHEMICALS WERE RELEASED, AND THE LIVES OF MORE THAN 5,000 AMERICANS WERE FOREVER CHANGED'** ([Fox News](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=48ab5ac4dda04ebf9ed7e3b618e9d8fb&_e=6HZszEsZIvqhmcjgiYd9utHZFR42w8y-plGjZz0xucn3RD3BM1mDMocJIVw0C5OYLijcrE9GxWmHxwmU0QvR7feuj86qhVq9Zue41C7jpWIdohPeMG1eZ_IWIuHwZz-lZz5d8MPZIEVOdMuXP_yCThlHFtaj9P0wVMIYQjcRWCtp1T9m0IiEZMZmJWnTCQTNbSqF0s13iAAOzykdU6tQayr5P3VFyjbx86mLXDM0zhd9OUkqGBT02V18QWnPiVqYHr-YfplYpSXEWr5BdVN7tg%3D%3D)) - Senators JD Vance, Marco Rubio and Josh Hawley penned an Op-ed urging passage of their Railway Safety Act.

"The path forward for this bill is clear. The Senate majority leader and the president have pledged to do what it takes to make it law, and a bipartisan group from the Ohio delegation has introduced similar legislation in the House of Representatives.

"This legislation should be of special interest to our Republican colleagues. America's railroads run through their rural districts and red communities. When derailments occur, it is predominantly Republican voters--their voters--who bear the brunt and who rush to put out the fires.

"We owe it to them to hold the railroad industry to a higher standard, and that's exactly what the Railway Safety Act will do."

clean_body: | Welcome back to Hillbilly on the Hill , a glance into Senator Vance's work in Washington and around Ohio! Senator Vance has been keeping busy fighting for Ohio. Check out some of the headlines about him over the past few weeks. ' IT'S TIME FOR CHOOSING. LET'S MAKE THE RIGHT ONE' () - Senator Vance penned an Op-ed urging passage of his bill that would hold Norfolk Southern accountable for its train derailment in East Palestine. "You cannot claim special government privileges, you cannot ask the government to bail you out, and then resist basic public safety. "We are the party of firefighters, of police officers, of the people who go to work, pay their taxes, fight our country's wars, and keep our communities safe. We are proud of that and we should be proud of that in the Republican Party. "I believe that we are the party of working people, but it's time to be the party of working people. We have a choice. Are we for big business and big government or are we for the people of East Palestine?" wrote Senator Vance. Read Senator Vance 's full article The covered Senator Vance's first few months in office: "His first months in office have surprised everyone -- except those who know him" In embracing the principles of his homeland, Vance is "making major progress for the ideology he represents...The Republican party and conservative movement are changing, and all signs point to him being able to deliver." ' THIS COMMONSENSE LEGISLATION RECOGNZES AN INHERENT TRUTH' () - Senator Vance introduced a bill last week that would designate English as the official language of the United States. "The English language has been a cornerstone of American culture for over 250 years. It is far past time for Congress to codify its place into law, which is exactly what this bill does," said Vance. ' THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION HAS BEEN RESISTANT TO BE HONEST WITH US' () - Senator Vance joined Tucker Carlson to discuss the lack of accountability in hundreds of billions of dollars the United States is sending to Ukraine. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: ' TOXIC CHEMICALS WERE RELEASED, AND THE LIVES OF MORE THAN 5,000 AMERICANS WERE FOREVER CHANGED' () - Senators JD Vance, Marco Rubio and Josh Hawley penned an Op-ed urging passage of their Railway Safety Act. "The path forward for this bill is clear. The Senate majority leader and the president have pledged to do what it takes to make it law, and a bipartisan group from the Ohio delegation has introduced similar legislation in the House of Representatives. "This legislation should be of special interest to our Republican colleagues. America's railroads run through their rural districts and red communities. When derailments occur, it is predominantly Republican voters--their voters--who bear the brunt and who rush to put out the fires. "We owe it to them to hold the railroad industry to a higher standard, and that's exactly what the Railway Safety Act will do." Read the senators ' full Op-ed ' A BASELESS MISDEMEANOR CHARGE'() - Senator JD Vance said: "Donald Trump is the former President of the United States, the leader of our nation's political opposition, and the presumptive Republican nominee in 2024," Vance said. "Alvin Bragg's decision to indict him is blatant election interference and a direct assault on the tens of millions of Americans who support him." ' OUR LEADERSHIP WAS SLOW TO RESPOND TO THIS CRISIS'() - Senator JD Vance addresses Norfolk Southern CEO during Senate hearing. Watch Senator Vance speak to the committee ' WE DON'T HAVE A REAL COUNTRY IF JUSTICE DEPENDS ON POLITICS'() -- On Saturday, Vance defended his endorsement of Trump's bid for president in 2024. "I've been asked by multiple reporters if an indictment would lead me to rescind my endorsement of Donald Trump. The answer is: hell no," he wrote in a tweet. ' SO MUCH OF THIS IS ABOUT PROMISES AND WHETHER THEY'RE GOING TO FOLLOW THROUGH' () - Senator JD Vance made another stop in East Palestine, hoping Norfolk Southern follows through on their promises to the people of the village. "There's going to be a tough balancing act over the next few years about how to support the people who stay in East Palestine and help the rebuilding effort while also making sure nobody is trapped here," Vance said. "We're going to have to strike that balance in the right way." Watch the story ' IT IS A TRAVESTY THAT RESIDENTS DO NOT HAVE THEIR COMMUNITY CLEANED UP' () - Senator Vance shared frustrations with local officials and residents about the slow clean up efforts. "Recovery for East Palestine is basically impossible until we clean up the mounds of toxic dirt," Vance said. "The fact that we have this massive chemical spill and the people here still don't have any confidence that this stuff is going to get moved out of their community in a timely way is a complete disgrace and a complete failure of leadership." ' BIDEN DOES NOT SEE THE PEOPLE OF EAST PALESTINE AS FRIENDS, BECAUSE THEY DIDN'T VOTE FOR HIM' () -- Senator JD Vance joined Sean Hannity to discuss the Biden Administration's delayed reaction to the train derailment in East Palestine. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. | Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., 1391 W 5th Avenue, Suite 314, Columbus, OH 43212 Copyright (C) 2023 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
---
| | | | | | Seventy Plus Endorsement List [Click Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NmzgNKdYs-c4DxhEETNweYKc5rRx0dQiO8t6suzC7pCq570paNjDyMLoJ5akPE9qSB-LPIrLz6S6I5mRMuuVot2qgA5Y6cb9Dagvtje3U1YVwY0VY7k6eX6qlDbOdN_DJIyDjNbiZh3sRjsGKgGUDo4OnJovCNNZrrZGjQHC_pgMekApRc726w==&c=z4zho43-G530sDfE1O2u6qwf9gg5yujNnePw6toQHbQEMl-56Ec3Lg==&ch=VY9a22lXEq-vNbunXKoZDvIbhZbhKzFlOFmSTaLiQ1VtcPmDpLxmKw==)
---
|
---
| Pray for Trump and our Republic
---
|
---
| Fellow Americans, I am praying for President Trump and our country today. Government agencies have been politically weaponized and they have made our criminal justice system a joke. When will we, the American people, have had enough of "rules for thee not for me"? We may not like what they have done to our election laws in Virginia and across our country, but I implore everyone to get involved and vote so we can rebuild trust and save our Republic!
---
| Silly Season
---
| People still keep asking about this video of the debate closing statements with Duane Adams having a Meltdown and Mudslinging, so here it is:
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NmzgNKdYs-c4DxhEETNweYKc5rRx0dQiO8t6suzC7pCq570paNjDyIn_fmiXqHKJYTfEwVVBQZubJKVk-5r5sXLEPp1sHUm6fczMkNtzgHmsQ0kP3_oJJXlvZk8Wk2FT0y1fBtVF_6WI9OT-hq__99367cRuqeTqYYFvo4LuaFjrmNbGeFaP09Qak-Cr5Vy6WJTzrecmOqUc-6Ew1q7KCYdkfVk5nTn7ZX69eD0gSyr-ecz5_pVNR-iP-AFJsMmQQlXz0utoteE=&c=z4zho43-G530sDfE1O2u6qwf9gg5yujNnePw6toQHbQEMl-56Ec3Lg==&ch=VY9a22lXEq-vNbunXKoZDvIbhZbhKzFlOFmSTaLiQ1VtcPmDpLxmKw==) for debate video.
Quote:
"I was supporting a different candidate, but switched to McGuire yesterday after seeing the debate video. That video showed me nothing will rattle McGuire and we need more leaders that won't be rattled."

[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NmzgNKdYs-c4DxhEETNweYKc5rRx0dQiO8t6suzC7pCq570paNjDyIn_fmiXqHKJZWl0y6DNwpqJNLaK7LmuEIIBSbzWGq-qMOQ84tbEaenyEybvjpPHm2Ni8q8iDn8aqUUvppMUsQZMnZOC0VrD0m7dPs_rO9IrDj9oFu3VI5WF8ep84SxNjea-Fi-otH6CEh1DFOLB_lTT3Ivysk9lLodl0WPI71KgxdwcjRUF6_imQ3HJlK799g==&c=z4zho43-G530sDfE1O2u6qwf9gg5yujNnePw6toQHbQEMl-56Ec3Lg==&ch=VY9a22lXEq-vNbunXKoZDvIbhZbhKzFlOFmSTaLiQ1VtcPmDpLxmKw==) for my response to the Duane Adams attack email with just facts.
[Click here ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NmzgNKdYs-c4DxhEETNweYKc5rRx0dQiO8t6suzC7pCq570paNjDyIn_fmiXqHKJVD-F-a1q1DWOPRcvwherbAwrpjnyXXGZbyCbLH3fv3dcBWA1WeGv6uzhhrPWKg7Wm3cF025mnQ4iInX30YFNy7Fbi_aAlLjfKZbzBoNh1tp6raI7eRaII5ZI-ZQJHXvy96h5V41w1KjdMUVbanl7bUT2p4YHnagKMnKmjX-w5MmBH8LtIt6X1Q==&c=z4zho43-G530sDfE1O2u6qwf9gg5yujNnePw6toQHbQEMl-56Ec3Lg==&ch=VY9a22lXEq-vNbunXKoZDvIbhZbhKzFlOFmSTaLiQ1VtcPmDpLxmKw==)for the 'Dirty Politics" flyer. My opponent, Duane Adams, bragged about this flyer during our debate. It is costing him and he should be ashamed.
---
| More Bad News for Louisa County
---
|
---
| My opponent continues to mislead the people by saying he never raises taxes, but the evidence is everywhere. At the debate we pointed out real-estate assessments have gone up 40% in Louisa over 5 years. Duane failed to lower the tax rate each year to give the folks, especially those on a fixed income, a break. Then another 13.9% average increase in real-estate assessments was posted in the paper (seen here). Last night, Duane again did not lower the tax rate. They did offer a one-time 3 cent tax rebate which, is tiny when your assessment goes up 13.9%. Three cents is no where near enough to cover the additional tax assessment increase. This means taxes for folks living in Louisa are going up even more and many may have to move.
---
| Send me to the Senate and I will continue the fight to lower your taxes. I stand by my conservative record and achievements in the House of Delegates and I am proud to be one of only nine, out of one hundred and forty legislators, to earn the highest award for conservatism in Virginia. I do not have a history of flip-flopping between parties, raising taxes each year, and calling a constituent a coward. You will not have to guess how I will vote in the Senate, and I will never forget the Senate District 10 seat belongs to the people.
I'm not going to get into mudslinging with Duane Adams or Bob Good. But I highly disagree with many of the statements made by both of them. Bob is supporting Duane because, when referring to John McGuire in a video, Bob said, "He tried to primary me". So let me get this straight, Bob is supporting a three time Democrat who has raised taxes in Louisa 40% over the last five years because I considered my options?
Again, I am going to focus on Virginia. Republicans control the House and the Governor's mansion, but Senate Democrats keep killing our efforts to un-California Virginia. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NmzgNKdYs-c4DxhEETNweYKc5rRx0dQiO8t6suzC7pCq570paNjDyCw6WdP1bOQUtfH-klT93N8y8wLawd_pHDfTy5lgXM-HYbd2jwKK6r-riPSm9a5-ibfh-ismrnq8gEIGMJw0hJJLy3NvEOAajbUKFUt_pSMaMhz5lNCIsWVPrb6zPEc9oVaY2Gn0thmDXtbmwaoOL-Y=&c=z4zho43-G530sDfE1O2u6qwf9gg5yujNnePw6toQHbQEMl-56Ec3Lg==&ch=VY9a22lXEq-vNbunXKoZDvIbhZbhKzFlOFmSTaLiQ1VtcPmDpLxmKw==) to see some of the legislation my team and I are working on. This race is too important to have personal vendettas. We need to send a solid conservative to the Senate to take back our beloved Commonwealth and un-California Virginia. God willing, and with your help, we will win the convention May 6 at Buckingham County High School!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NmzgNKdYs-c4DxhEETNweYKc5rRx0dQiO8t6suzC7pCq570paNjDyM6cnZO8vMftmgBVelQWbBDOOVrvg_cDwlPlWvMCoXr2nyDBLhDbePnpcyfz4TqQPgA2fOmfTztEHqf7MraXUN9jpONgzMYfsvD3KbavOIHG&c=z4zho43-G530sDfE1O2u6qwf9gg5yujNnePw6toQHbQEMl-56Ec3Lg==&ch=VY9a22lXEq-vNbunXKoZDvIbhZbhKzFlOFmSTaLiQ1VtcPmDpLxmKw==)
---
| This is a close race, but we will win if all of our delegates show up on May 6 at Buckingham County High School. I'm running for State Senate so we can help Governor Glenn Youngkin un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
---

Bob is supporting Duane because, when referring to John McGuire in a video, Bob said, "He tried to primary me". So let me get this straight, Bob is supporting a three time Democrat who has raised taxes in Louisa 40% over the last five years because I considered my options? Again, I am going to focus on Virginia. Republicans control the House and the Governor's mansion, but Senate Democrats keep killing our efforts to un-California Virginia. == to see some of the legislation my team and I are working on. This race is too important to have personal vendettas. We need to send a solid conservative to the Senate to take back our beloved Commonwealth and un-California Virginia. God willing, and with your help, we will win the convention May 6 at Buckingham County High School! | == | This is a close race, but we will win if all of our delegates show up on May 6 at Buckingham County High School. I'm running for State Senate so we can help Governor Glenn Youngkin un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | Seventy Plus Endorsement List == | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

Friend,
The radical Left's end game is clear.
Soros believes that with his hand-picked D.A. - Alvin Bragg - having **INDICTED** me for committing __no__ __crime__ , they can bleed our campaign dry by dragging us through witch hunt after witch hunt.
But what the Democrats never fail to underestimate about our incredible movement is **YOU** ...

body:
Sign the petition >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/51f89487bcb749f0/f7f74faeb2ec95c2c3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
Friend, I recently introduced a resolution to ensure that **millions of illegal aliens** released into this country by the Biden Administration would not be eligible for benefits such as _SNAP/food-stamps, housing vouchers, Medicaid, and cash payments_ from the US Government. The Trump Administration rightfully designated these public programs for **U.S. citizens only** , but in December 2022, Joe Biden made our southern border crisis even worse by changing the rules and incentivizing illegal immigration with the promise of access to these taxpayer-funded programs. **Help me stop illegal immigrants from stealing our hard-earned resources today!**

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWGo03hDPN)
_Please see a special message from our sponsor:_
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61669341:WGo03hDPN:m:1:2532013465:5480080A9CB62D97F7A291381C3A258F:r)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61669341:WGo03hDPN:m:1:2532013465:5480080A9CB62D97F7A291381C3A258F:r) [NO](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61669341:WGo03hDPN:m:1:2532013465:5480080A9CB62D97F7A291381C3A258F:r) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61669341:WGo03hDPN:m:1:2532013465:5480080A9CB62D97F7A291381C3A258F:r)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---

---

Please see a special message from our sponsor: | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. In an interview published in Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: " My job is to apply the Constitution." But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." That is why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Biden's wants to ban "assault weapons"
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| After last week's tragedy, the democrats have placed you in their sights and are once again trying to ban guns and destroy your second amendment rights. Democratic House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries calls on Republicans to debate a ban on semi-automatic rifles. Biden's press secretary stated that the President would support any legislation to "remove" or confiscate assault weapons. But when the Democrats are asked to define an "assault weapon", they describe every gun in production.| | |
---
THEY ARE COMING FOR YOUR GUNS!
There is no longer any question about the motives of the radical anti-gunners in Washington or their fellow democrats in Mississippi.
In a recent debate on the floor of the Mississippi House of Representatives, Democrats argued against allowing trained teachers who volunteer to carry a gun so our students are protected.
They actually prefer students dying at the hands of mentally disturbed evil killers over allowing you to protect yourself and other innocent lives.
These people are radical, evil haters of honest, hard-working Mississippians. They prefer the evils of our society and seek to destroy our constitution, our state and our government.
[**_Please send your personal message telling your senators and your congressional representatives in Washington that we expect them to stand up for our constitutional rights._**](https://www.votervoice.net/MSFreedomCaucus/Campaigns/103552/Respond)
[**_Send Your Message NOW!_**](https://www.votervoice.net/MSFreedomCaucus/Campaigns/103552/Respond)
Anti-gunners like those in the Mississippi legislature who support Joe Biden and his radical leftist ideas are hypocrites. These democrats seek to disarm you, leaving you helpless and vulnerable while they arm themselves and their families.
They believe their life is more valuable than yours. They are seeking control of you because that advances their political agenda.
They want to destroy our constitution, our way of life, and your freedom.
But we can stop them.
[**_Please send your personal email telling your senators and your congressional representatives in Washington that we expect them to stand up for our constitutional rights._**](https://www.votervoice.net/MSFreedomCaucus/Campaigns/103552/Respond)
[**_Send Your Message NOW!_**](https://www.votervoice.net/MSFreedomCaucus/Campaigns/103552/Respond)
| |
---

| Thank you for taking a stand for our second amendment rights. The only way to protect our freedom and our nation is for good, honest people like yourself to take a stand. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is here to help you voice your opinion.Please donate and help us continue this fight.
---

But during my investigation, I uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. And I exposed Russiagate as a hoax.

President Trump put his faith in me and made me his DOD chief of staff. He knew I was someone he could trust to get things done.

Peter, As a refugee from communist Vietnam who went on to serve our country, I’ve witnessed the weaponization of law for political gain in failed states.

_But I NEVER thought I’d see it right here in America._

**Instead of using the justice system to create law and order, a far-Left attorney general in New York is using it as a political weapon.**

_Make no mistake - this is nothing but a political stunt._

[**America is better than this, and we must unite to safeguard our freedom to be conservative. Stand with me today AGAINST tyrants who want to extinguish the flame of freedom and liberty in our country.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=8426c722fcb34808a8bf42f3f391df9b&_e=okcgpPnVKyyOZzIWXwLwJiD3teRZ9kQU6LB1KRQs98MaU2S3aJaiHPJ5_G3g08ADXQAC3rpS1rtnEPNcEtD94tgcXr_DwXbjXrnvQoXRK2sWCPNQh9EWqYE490s6rtmLmNTAPl85RxkAnmWWiE4RQPgcBmGy57saY702xUbsqdZXv9JIwCwbSplLtB3F_LCT4SgopfhladmHWn15TPcbXtIs2gOS0QhKVnoUjHKZ0Ff3Is-knDf01sjvSkMyD2KUemnbxfnM7jaJ8wfLQwe7xhlzcP2pgFFKL3_wtvnsbik33LHXrUJ5cECo6iyRwK1iBW_SgHBR08-95DoieUBpcZJYCFbUkLqsLqiK8FwM4wg%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, As a refugee from communist Vietnam who went on to serve our country, I’ve witnessed the weaponization of law for political gain in failed states. But I NEVER thought I’d see it right here in America. Instead of using the justice system to create law and order, a far-Left attorney general in New York is using it as a political weapon. Make no mistake - this is nothing but a political stunt. There is so much that our criminal justice can do instead of target conservatives. For starters, they can secure our border or help quell skyrocketing crime rates. But instead, with the funding of billionaire Liberals, they’re trying to erode the very freedom that America is based on. I won't stand for it, and neither should you. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

subject: Out of the Frying Pan, Into the Fire
body:

Trump's prosecution is long overdue, but could actually fuel his return to power
| | [Listen to preview](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=112644541&utm_source=podcast-email&play_audio=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTEyNjQ0NTQxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODA2MjE3NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4MzIxMzc1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wAuOVG3VNVbRZMt0JRcdOAZzh6hoJwP7y3gx8Aea2jI&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email#play)|
---|---|---
---
---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ff586bb4-dca9-4532-b757-2b51c1070b71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | Shahid Buttar| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=112644541&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTEyNjQ0NTQxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY4MDYyMTc1MCwiZXhwIjoxNjgzMjEzNzUwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.E3FSU6ZauJEF0BfJZGbQciwoAe-08iQZZxBxjIvsmXY&utm_medium=email&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=112644541&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTEyNjQ0NTQxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODA2MjE3NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4MzIxMzc1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wAuOVG3VNVbRZMt0JRcdOAZzh6hoJwP7y3gx8Aea2jI&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=112644541&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTEyNjQ0NTQxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODA2MjE3NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4MzIxMzc1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wAuOVG3VNVbRZMt0JRcdOAZzh6hoJwP7y3gx8Aea2jI)
Today, millions of Americans will celebrate the beginning of a long overdue legal proceeding seeking accountability for a former criminal president. But the criminal prosecution of Donald Trump is ultimately years late, the indictment expected today in New York is largely misdirected, and the unfolding saga could quite likely provide the ironic key to his political revival.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2eec047b-e6ac-4ebd-a9ad-3b1bd073e12d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### The tip of an iceberg
Trump's indictment might delight those of us aware of his history of fraud, lies, and self-serving deceit. But even an [unlikely](https://substack.com/redirect/a2807fa4-0ddc-408e-bf44-b003f6864f61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) conviction would do little to heal America.
On the one hand, Trump set a new standard in public crime. From blithely inviting political violence to thumbing his nose at election results, as well as the rights of women and minorities, he consistently demonstrated everything bad about unaccountable power.
Trump's worst crimes against our Republic included scamming the American people, a [constitutional offense](https://substack.com/redirect/7aa35f7d-f6de-41ec-a11e-f6d090a75121?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) inviting impeachment. Yet when Democrats led by Nancy Pelosi finally showed up for impeachment after [years of delay](https://substack.com/redirect/865c3274-49cd-4483-984b-af514f9ccf5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), they accepted watered down charges that conspicuously omitted any reference to stealing taxpayer money and putting it in his filthy pockets.
[Devin Parker @mysterycycle@ShahidForChange And when she was finally dragged into doing the impeachment process, instead of Trump's violations of the Emoluments clause, and his building of concentration camps for children forcibly separated from their parents, she focused on "he tried to hurt Biden politically with Russia"](https://substack.com/redirect/95fb3990-7e85-45ea-9a56-dc4cde698872?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[6:48 PM ∙ Jun 26, 2020
* * *
6Likes1Retweet](https://substack.com/redirect/95fb3990-7e85-45ea-9a56-dc4cde698872?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I'm not the only one to recognize Trump's violations of the Emoluments Clause as the key to holding him accountable. Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-MD), who worked as a constitutional law professor at American University before his election to Congress, led the House effort to impeach Trump in 2021, following the insurrection that he invited on January 6 of that year. Raskin [vocally championed accountability](https://substack.com/redirect/92058373-3984-4d22-a49a-6fc15a7725d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for Trump's self-enrichment through public office at the time.
Despite serving as the lead prosecutor for the House, however, Raskin was overruled by Nancy Pelosi.
I've observed one reason (or perhaps 200 million of them) why Pelosi may have been hesitant to seek accountability for Trump filling his pockets at taxpayer expense: her similar culpability for similar offenses, particularly [insider trading](https://substack.com/redirect/3ebd81e2-2b33-4527-bb1c-edaf31e3e650?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from which corporate executives--but not Members of Congress who craft the laws--are legally prohibited. Pelosi may have been especially hesitant to challenge Trump's financial self-dealing given his predictable willingness to sling mud in every direction.
Ultimately, the rot Trump helped expose is systemic, far beyond the mania of a single corrupt former president.
Those of us paying attention (unlike gullible news editors inclined to construct ignorant cults of personality) might recall that Trump's worst crimes and human rights abuses were enabled by leading Democrats whose corruption has long openly rivaled his own. These figures will remain at large even if the orange figurehead behind whom they hide is ultimately removed.
[Shahid Buttar (find me on Substack) @ShahidForChangeTimes like this require voices in Congress who put their oath of office before their careers. Pelosi has supported Trump's 📌foreign policy 📌concentration camps 📌corporate trade deals 📌military budget 📌self enrichment at public expense Want resistance? #ReplacePelosi Gravel Institute @GravelInstituteDonald Trump is a fascist.](https://substack.com/redirect/6b082cf1-2ad2-4534-8bf0-bfa9571916ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[4:49 AM ∙ Jun 2, 2020
* * *
1,552Likes426Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/6b082cf1-2ad2-4534-8bf0-bfa9571916ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=112644541&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTEyNjQ0NTQxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODA2MjE3NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4MzIxMzc1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wAuOVG3VNVbRZMt0JRcdOAZzh6hoJwP7y3gx8Aea2jI)
### Missing the Point
The indictment expected to be unsealed in New York today will reportedly include over a dozen felonies that are normally charged as misdemeanors, all related to Trump's payment of hush money to porn star Stormy Daniels, with whom he had an extramarital affair in 2006. To say that the charges understate his crimes would itself be a vast understatement.
White men in American politics have a long history of sexual misconduct, from President John F. Kennedy to Governor Andrew Cuomo. The fact that both nominees for the 2020 presidential election faced credible accusations from multiple sources offers a poignant reflection on the persistence of patriarchy, despite the fetish for identitarian politics that dominates the Democratic Party today.
But the indictment being unsealed today won't address Trump's history of toxic masculinity, or trying to overturn an election, or stealing from the American public. It will address lies he told about payments he made to keep a seemingly consensual relationship secret. Of all the issues on which to indict Trump, it is both the most trivial and also the one that, for him, could ultimately prove the most opportune.
### Fuel for a conflagration
The indictment could predictably strengthen Trump, particularly by offering his supporters evidence of his self-serving and false claim to have been marginalized despite his vast privilege. His cult of personality relies on a narrative of coastal elites abusing their power and authority over working class men & women next door.
Resolving what is ultimately political controversy in a criminal prosecution places at risk the legitimacy of the judiciary (which has taken a consistent beating over the past generation as the Supreme Court has grown [overtly politicized](https://substack.com/redirect/1260b88e-c0b9-4066-9737-1aa5d35d97dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), at the same time that it politically [plays right into Trump's hands](https://substack.com/redirect/5951cfe5-5fad-4da9-ac9f-7e36111d26e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
A number of organizations, including _The Intercept,_ have [called for Trump's trial to be televised](https://substack.com/redirect/75820795-bcd3-43ff-8f93-decc4005143f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and even launched a [public petition](https://substack.com/redirect/75820795-bcd3-43ff-8f93-decc4005143f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) supporting that position. They appear to ignore the danger of television spewing Trump's bile directly into the living rooms (and sadly impressionable minds) of ignorant voters who have already proven themselves too unsophisticated to see through his lies.
Trump is the man, after all, who lied his way to the White House once before, largely proving the adage that there is no bad news by embracing every seemingly disqualifying scandal one could imagine. Giving him free exposure to the mass public repeats the error shared by mass media sources in 2016, which created a cult of personality around the man by making him the center of so much attention.
Many voices have [criticized](https://substack.com/redirect/25f6040a-2096-4db9-8dd2-1a4d5846e112?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 60 Minutes and host Diane Sawyer for recently giving Marjorie Taylor-Green a mass media platform to spread her venom without an informed critique. Allowing Trump's trial to be televised would compound that mistake a thousand-fold.
Ultimately, this all escalates a political crisis that Trump himself helped start. None of this pleases me--but it is also unsurprising. Note the date on the tweet below. It was far from the first--or last--time I saw a crisis coming that most instead chose to ignore.
[Shahid Buttar (find me on Substack) @ShahidForChangeTrump is casting doubt on the legitimacy of the election even before it happens. He's foreshadowing his plans to contest the result. We must all understand what is at stake. We may be watching a coup unfolding in slow motion. ](https://substack.com/redirect/b1728df9-b8cb-4e4a-af8c-d355db80ed53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[theatlantic.comThe Election That Could Break AmericaIf the vote is close, Donald Trump could easily throw the election into chaos and subvert the result. Who will stop him?...](https://substack.com/redirect/ad20c37e-2e52-4bed-a7c1-6446010f4c1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[2:32 AM ∙ Sep 30, 2020
* * *
136Likes39Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/b1728df9-b8cb-4e4a-af8c-d355db80ed53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### What would real accountability look like?
In addition to the indictment being unsealed today in New York, Trump also faces three other ongoing criminal investigations: two federal investigations and one in Georgia. In addition to the Justice Department's investigations into his misuse of classified information, it and the State of Georgia are also investigating his role in contesting the results of the 2020 presidential election.
Each of those investigations threaten the former president more than the one in New York, in several ways. The crimes they explore are more serious, less salacious, and less easily spun to his advantage in the court of public opinion. They are also more likely to influence the 2024 election, based on the sad observation that Americans have long embraced white men with problematic sexual histories.
None of these investigations, however, address Trump's worst crimes.
If anyone were actually interested in holding Trump accountable, they'd go after the conflicts of interest shared by Democrats who match his pattern of illegal self-enrichment through public office.
I've called for precisely that--both in the form of policy change to prohibit congressional insider trading, as well as investigations and prosecutions of policymakers who have profited from their continuing corporate conflicts of interest. Those with the authority to initiate those steps, however, are unlikely to follow either of them anytime soon since they themselves are the ones implicated.
While foxes guard the henhouse in Washington, America is being distracted by a legal charade in New York that could ironically strengthen a wolf.
Busting Trump for lying about paying hush money to a porn star is a lot like prosecuting Al Capone for tax evasion. But while Trump might be no less a criminal than Capone, he is a former president. He should, accordingly, be prosecuted for his crimes against the public, rather than let off the hook for them and then made into a martyr by a prosecutor and judge examining only his most theatrical (rather than most serious) offenses.
Executive accountability was among the issues that drove me to run for Congress starting in 2018. Having watched the institutional press consistently fail its mission to hold power accountable, I invite you to stay informed going forward with a free or paid subscription.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..F2Tl36wOJsLt_Pgu0V4IdlBRBxuc57iOd-x--gWrgqU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=112644541)
Accountability would also entail keeping Trump as far from elected office as possible. And with Biden's public support hanging by a thread in the face of a series of ongoing failures, a legal process focused on Trump's constitutional (rather than relatively petty) crimes would be opportune.
Yet--not for the first time--Trump finds remarkable support from Democrats who claim to oppose (while instead ironically enabling) him.
Paid subscribers can access an article I wrote in 2019 calling for Trump's impeachment in the years when Pelosi continued to claim that holding Trump accountable "just isn't worth it." My article was cited at the time by a leading authority on constitutional law, and made the case for the impeachment process that Pelosi refused to support when she finally showed up to take limited action...

They appear to ignore the danger of television spewing Trump's bile directly into the living rooms (and sadly impressionable minds) of ignorant voters who have already proven themselves too unsophisticated to see through his lies. Trump is the man, after all, who lied his way to the White House once before, largely proving the adage that there is no bad news by embracing every seemingly disqualifying scandal one could imagine. Giving him free exposure to the mass public repeats the error shared by mass media sources in 2016, which created a cult of personality around the man by making him the center of so much attention. Many voices have 60 Minutes and host Diane Sawyer for recently giving Marjorie Taylor-Green a mass media platform to spread her venom without an informed critique. Allowing Trump's trial to be televised would compound that mistake a thousand-fold. Ultimately, this all escalates a political crisis that Trump himself helped start. None of this pleases me--but it is also unsurprising. Note the date on the tweet below. It was far from the first--or last--time I saw a crisis coming that most instead chose to ignore. What would real accountability look like? In addition to the indictment being unsealed today in New York, Trump also faces three other ongoing criminal investigations: two federal investigations and one in Georgia. In addition to the Justice Department's investigations into his misuse of classified information, it and the State of Georgia are also investigating his role in contesting the results of the 2020 presidential election. Each of those investigations threaten the former president more than the one in New York, in several ways. The crimes they explore are more serious, less salacious, and less easily spun to his advantage in the court of public opinion. They are also more likely to influence the 2024 election, based on the sad observation that Americans have long embraced white men with problematic sexual histories. None of these investigations, however, address Trump's worst crimes. If anyone were actually interested in holding Trump accountable, they'd go after the conflicts of interest shared by Democrats who match his pattern of illegal self-enrichment through public office. I've called for precisely that--both in the form of policy change to prohibit congressional insider trading, as well as investigations and prosecutions of policymakers who have profited from their continuing corporate conflicts of interest. Those with the authority to initiate those steps, however, are unlikely to follow either of them anytime soon since they themselves are the ones implicated. While foxes guard the henhouse in Washington, America is being distracted by a legal charade in New York that could ironically strengthen a wolf. Busting Trump for lying about paying hush money to a porn star is a lot like prosecuting Al Capone for tax evasion. But while Trump might be no less a criminal than Capone, he is a former president. He should, accordingly, be prosecuted for his crimes against the public, rather than let off the hook for them and then made into a martyr by a prosecutor and judge examining only his most theatrical (rather than most serious) offenses. Executive accountability was among the issues that drove me to run for Congress starting in 2018. Having watched the institutional press consistently fail its mission to hold power accountable, I invite you to stay informed going forward with a free or paid subscription. Accountability would also entail keeping Trump as far from elected office as possible. And with Biden's public support hanging by a thread in the face of a series of ongoing failures, a legal process focused on Trump's constitutional (rather than relatively petty) crimes would be opportune. Yet--not for the first time--Trump finds remarkable support from Democrats who claim to oppose (while instead ironically enabling) him. Paid subscribers can access an article I wrote in 2019 calling for Trump's impeachment in the years when Pelosi continued to claim that holding Trump accountable "just isn't worth it." My article was cited at the time by a leading authority on constitutional law, and made the case for the impeachment process that Pelosi refused to support when she finally showed up to take limited action... name: Greg Landsman
subject: We wouldn’t be here without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
I know you’ve heard from our team a lot over the past week, but I just wanted to reach out and say thank you.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61262042/399608257/1921099384?refcode=em_eng_2023.04.04_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTM4OTAyMS1mZWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=75Qi_7kHwk16duBqxQnsLRfzQOV3iw0ArqTMsG9YL2E=)
---
Hi friend, it’s Greg.

I know you’ve heard from our team a lot over the past week, but I just wanted to reach out and say __thank you.__

When I shared the importance of our March end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, this people-powered team listened and stepped up to the challenge.

And for the entirety of last week, we had grassroots supporters from Southwest Ohio and around the country chipping in what they could, when they could – _because they believe our children and families are worth fighting for._

I’m proud to say that, because of the support of folks like you, we surpassed the first end-of-quarter goal of our re-election campaign! I can’t thank you enough.

**We wouldn’t be here without you.** Grateful you’re on our team.

Appreciate you,

Greg

subject: I want your input, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x83M4dZJugfYV1qaqFPlv6RqhHUwGp3jx00BzdM94JVAiiWKvLXtSSr7G8RUinwS7_HPOEHFtsBC3bwDWxIOjU0FtmvuuC96aicTrXGdRp4HDJsPwEinq7S2U5aMK7G20HTjzeEpV4lEqwmDjwwI2bIfXeJjFMQmVzXlSR9cxjWoLD38FEKMsDEgI-jCl3AD3_yaPPC0NB-qDoRvXzTbF8jp1rSBfz0UufCnohQ-HPxo7qznjuvFxCJQmocguucDU3P2Uq52-O_nd_0WOmCPw-rHJqXHARwiBh6LRiD_RLzO58A0sw894c46rXcnlSjZThCldGocbROd2DN5X6rkJbR2VOsEgPqZ3fr3zgFg3hkw/3v2/vIKxWs_gRL2QDod41zbOfA/h0/eIU0mX2DLq-4atARlorLvF0HdghMJ7X4j1ctmjxFir0)
---
Hi Peter, I wanted to give a heartfelt **thank you** to everyone who donated to our campaign ahead of last week’s FEC fundraising deadline. With your support, we met and exceeded our first quarter fundraising goal! Your support couldn't have come at a better time. We’re beginning to see some of the dangerous policies this Republican-led House is working to advance -- including an energy bill that’s really just a giveaway to fossil fuel companies and big polluters. **The importance of retaking the majority has never been more clear.** The fact that we met our first quarter fundraising goal is a great show of strength as we prepare to face eventual challengers in IL-17. It will be critical to continue meeting these benchmarks as the campaign progresses – especially since we know dark-money funded corporate PACs will be pouring money into attacks against me. I’m heartened to know that grassroots supporters like you have consistently come through for us when we needed it most. Without your backing, I wouldn’t have been elected to Congress. **I value the feedback of my supporters and constituents, so I wanted to ask you, Peter: what issues do you want to see addressed in Congress?** [**To give us your thoughts on the issues we should focus on to retake the House majority, please take a minute to take our survey.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkc_LuhNMcusU0-Z0R0kweVeUSpWE1E89n5sKbZ4Q5cjBt-SZJ_y2y-zJM1Vpvuab5-YezvBK5yc1Q8elggCpDqFc70gVpIN_xm58q1M4lbKuUG2-iNbFWZEzmq9iGQ83VeH2t4zyk2kLbawoSiQqaJahbkdWRtFsuGzw9JxCnd1eWhsP6HSWyvKjxdbQiNW7QyXA9jjprmsxD05_s6xWttdTg3a6dA6op1SyesXDEfcbHL-HV1CAnjd-f31C7fxp8/3v2/vIKxWs_gRL2QDod41zbOfA/h1/aeN6fleTWcWqIz4zd6MV244GdfkFoJMkXGvjPT3WTeE)
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkc_LuhNMcusU0-Z0R0kweVeUSpWE1E89n5sKbZ4Q5cjBt-SZJ_y2y-zJM1Vpvuab7TzFAP6ui08VLznzrQS7wJnp41mqD_vQ86695N6GEj6exfLcrsg9Zauh0alFLiaVglImXOxwLSeJCqic99tSP2cUgMn7MACC6xr-ivUbgDaUQngmMORqjaXnVt2hm2bsl2sOC0lC4jFILQlCBpgXMwAr2a7FF9bJGKuesZPv7Rv_jm3Kr4y2eda3D7ap7m-9Q/3v2/vIKxWs_gRL2QDod41zbOfA/h2/mhKGMTSYnkYL019ig0ZBVGFRM0UPgGK4t_hhFAA1gVs)
---
I appreciate your input, Eric
---
|

body:
Help me stop this Witch Hunt!

|
---
| | |

Friend, Alvin Bragg has a lot of explaining to do.

It's Oversight Chairman James Comer.

_**Make no mistake: this political prosecution of Donald Trump is an attack on American democracy. **_

I'm doing everything I can to hold this radical Soros backed DA accountable, but I need your help.

_**I 've already demanded documents from this Soros backed DA, and I'm only getting started. **_

My promise to you is that House Republicans and I will not rest until this political prosecution is revealed for what it is -- a Witch Hunt.

name: Fair Fight
subject: Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
The result of the Wisconsin Supreme Court election could have a domino effect. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61262370/399609437/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230404_f_wisupremecourt2_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTc4NDQxNy1mZmQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mo0tFQRcnKmaDy22oJKR7cx-hRmmMiQZl02Y-tkTIxk=&emci=9adf89d5-fdd2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ba784417-ffd2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20St.=20George?=
subject: Hey, did you see this? Join us as a 2023 Member today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=981def056c&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Hey Peter,

Did you see the email our Chairman sent you the other day? I wanted to forward it over to you in case you hadn’t, because it is just that important for our success in 2023 and the upcoming 2024 elections. As you know, our party relies on the support of our members and donors to promote conservative values and elect Republicans up and down the ballot – and we rely HEAVILY on our Sustaining members to make success a reality.

Our goal is to have every Member back on board by May 1st, so check the email out below and [**renew your Membership today with a donation of $10, $25, $50 or more so we can keep up the fight!**](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=570f814278&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d5544bda51&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| FYI - Our grassroots program broke state records in 2022 and we are working hard to deliver an even stronger grassroots program in 2024, but we can't do it without your continued support –[ so renew or become a sustaining member today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3cd6661b30&e=6a281f566d)

Sincerely,

Amanda St. George
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED EMAIL**
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Dear Peter,

I'm excited to let you know that **our[2023 Washington State Republican Party Membership cards](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=515bd52655&e=6a281f566d) are on the way**, and I am asking you to join the thousands who have already renewed their membership by investing in a stronger Republican Party.

By renewing your Sustaining Membership today, you'll be joining us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction. Your support will help us to recruit and train new activists and volunteers, launch effective advertising campaigns, and support our Republican candidates at all levels of government.

Embossed with your name and featuring our logo, I hope your Card will be a constant reminder that Sustaining Members like you are the cornerstone of our party.

I also hope your Card will be a symbol of the victories that we’ll earn if we unify and continue to focus on the Democrats and the disasters they’ve created across our state and America.

Most importantly, I want your Card to be a reminder of our Republican solutions to those problems – solutions that will give hope to millions of voters who’ve lost faith in a process that’s led by woke liberals.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b2d91c9ddb&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4c8d22c5fc&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| By earning victory in local elections this year and flipping seats in Olympia next year, Washington Republicans can fight to put convicted criminals behind bars. We can cut wasteful and corrupt government programs and lower your taxes. And we can protect the sanctity of your vote. But we can’t do this without your support.

[I'm asking you today to become a 2023 Sustaining Member TODAY with a donation of ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=755c031459&e=6a281f566d)[$10,](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0ed67ae07c&e=6a281f566d) [$25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0fa271fced&e=6a281f566d), [$50](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d246f0431a&e=6a281f566d),[ or more.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d4327e566f&e=6a281f566d) Every dollar counts, and every contribution makes a difference in our fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction.
---
| [Renew you membership Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=06fc4d001a&e=6a281f566d "Renew you membership Today!")
---
| As a [card carrying member of the Republican Party](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=434b3f7df4&e=6a281f566d), you can know that you are making the difference and helping us recruit and support strong candidates that will win in 2023 as we set the stage to win big in 2024.

Thank you for your continued support of our party and our mission. Together, we can make a real difference and ensure that Washington State doesn’t fall any further to the radical out-of-touch democrats.

Thank you in advance for your support,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
---
| [Become a Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f107355ac4&e=6a281f566d "Become a Sustaining Member Today!")

body:
It’s URGENT...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2OnDAQhJ-muYFw2xg4cMjGmUMmP5coiXIZNbaZ6RU2BMyizdNHjGb3-lWpVZ-awjzy8NpB_QSIN3YrIIL8AIhn9fT7mz7_Opv8q_j5KTe6UvuR4kdATK-zf68-rhQ-EI8HrU3mOrQNWpv5Tuim1FiJCrNb54i0KLHqhfS6aXo1VEI3VmlZ91Rbl3GHJcpSlUpo0QpRVL2w5Aey1jVCCQ2q3DkWboo0uue0bGEu7BSysbulNK_3SSfA0-rttvhi57h4dzQORi8-p-AXtpQ_TxxTPmzRLcQrx2tupxA4Je8BT05J1Ej14LSq2rYFedpSuATveAsgzUNWH3CdtsV6kMbyhR7MUpiJrxGkeRN6S6aYfEwgTVM1AlBf4sgOpJEmJvf5T_uy3uH9HdL0X67ff_wr_6ps6dy88zjyqmtQ5fVYcIj9DwAA__8showM)

Friend,
It’s hard to believe it’s come to this.
What was once a country _of, by,_ and _for_ the people is now run by left-wing radicals who would arrest a United States president and their leading opponent NOT for committing a crime, but for putting YOU – the America People – first.
But I know my father’s resolve is stronger than ever.
And I wanted to reach out to his biggest supporters on this dark day to let you know that he’s never been more committed to WINNING BACK the White House and SAVING our country.
My father has always been a warrior, and rest assured, _he will NEVER SURRENDER our great country to the Left’s tyranny._
You see, the Democrats believe their witch hunts will end the America First Movement.
They couldn't be more wrong!
_My father knows it, you know it, and by this time tomorrow, our movement will be twice as strong and more united than ever before._
**Which is why I want to show him a list of ALL the patriots who stepped up to peacefully defend our incredible movement during these unprecedented and dark times.**
[**Please make a contribution of ANY amount – _truly, even just $1_ – to peacefully DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts and have YOUR NAME added to the list of supporters that I’m going to share with my father.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT_NcAPhsTFw4LBbmh7SP5dV21vkjIdkVtiwYBptP31FlO3Rv_dkvZ_GhXmU4b2D-hkQr-JXQAT9BIhH8_z7uz3-Ovb5N_Xzc97bytz2FD8BYnqf-X_18UvBwcm407rPfIfUIFHGnbJNabFSFWbXzuvzMDBpLlsmxQ5ry0ZXxjTKszlzJh2WqEtTGmVVq1RRnRU5HhyRb5RRFkx5k1j4KbrRv6ZlC3NBU8jG7prSvN4nHQAPK9O2cHGTuLDfGztzfzh3gRchl79OElM-bNEvTlaJl5ymECQlZsCDNxotunrw1lRt24I-bCmcAnvZAuj-IWt3uE7bQgy6Jzm5ByMXZieXCLr_EPpIppg4JtB9UzUK0J7iKH5_rl_Wt5cnQ_oO7-fQ_fnr5cfL3_LNZEvn55uMo6y2BlNe9gW72L8AAAD__yB_jIM)
---
[ADD YOUR NAME TO THE LIST](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT_NcAPZ4z_AgUO3bg6bbntZtb1Fju2QWWFDwZTufvqKKOn1955G76excRro8t5B_QSIV_ILIIL4BIhH-fTrmz7-PJryhf_4Uhqt5Lan-BkQ8_sU_lfvV6oQLQ07rU3hO3QNOleEjuuGaVRcYXHtlApBKS8086ptnWVeCcsUc7XWvK2bgjpkKJhkkmvecl6pM3c2XKxzvuGSa5Bso1T5MdnBv-V5jVPlxlgM3TXnablNOgAeluDWOVQbpTn4vbEz-yeUNoaZnC3fRkq5vKzJz5YWSn3pxhgp5xAAD14K1Gjri9dStW0L4rDmeIrB0xpBmLus3uEyrrMLIIyjk70zZ-NkqU8gzEPokYwph5RBmEY1HFCf0kAehHn-e071x6t9frnB2zuEOX_tv79-sN-ymDs_bTQMtOgaJOv3BbvYvwAAAP__ksqLlg)

Eric Trump

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding President Trump, and we’re glad you’re on our team.

Thank you for joining Team Trump. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

But what the Democrats never fail to underestimate about our incredible movement is YOU ... ... The more than 74 MILLION American patriots who REFUSE to allow our great country to become a third world nation. No matter how many vicious witch hunts they subject us to, we will not bend, we will not break, and we will NEVER stop standing up for TRUE JUSTICE - an America where the PEOPLE are put FIRST, not the Swamp creatures, globalist special interests, or the powers that be. But because they know I can never be bought, bullied, or controlled, the attacks will never stop. Our ONLY choice is to fend off each and every witch hunt they throw our way. **They sing the national anthem.**

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

clean_body: When Hillary Clinton and Obama committed campaign infractions, they only paid fines. Friend, When Hillary Clinton and Obama committed campaign infractions, they only paid fines. The government gangsters are coming after America-First patriots, just like you. Their message is clear. If they can detain President Trump, they can do it to any one of us. But I'm not going to wait for them to come after us. I'm taking the fight to them! My goal is to raise $38,000 in the next 48 hours to fund the legal battles for America-First patriots. Now, we're expanding our mission to help patriots and whistler blowers battle the Deep State in the courts. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee. When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. But during my investigation, I uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. And I exposed Russiagate as a hoax. President Trump put his faith in me and made me his DOD chief of staff. He knew I was someone he could trust to get things done. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First defendants. We are helping several Jan 6th defendant families, veterans, and other whistleblowers that are exposing the weaponization of the government. name: Quentin James, President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC
subject: we continue to be guided by MLK’s words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8SU0Ldq-FL-scUo2LuJHsYlAseFZFtK0KJ4WgKw9eYoDf-QJ8z7Hxj-8PYJpJG4HnHQc9a9OqYHxHQSJdapL8E6zNoxqREkXjXFiKdLPIHBAjfdL_NsFpjIxCq06w3wmsD1HnHNhj6rpNbrAjnaGA2k7BubrrypBtAsb80ZBIdRQwLwXPzVkY9Wpyk5m_frdoMCjV_BhxeHJoUts-nQunvw8HxF7L4cawuEtiY_psrUqq41xsmqCGH4YwA69GHW1b6KrTGU6Juz1dJ1LtsIWQD0R48WOrRfkQhM19mjZNjqYKn-gSiMgiAak0uA3Ofg_JQ/3v2/V6EnjBGhTi6B9DvbqTQolw/h0/bf_gZkMK7ZvS7pE1VbKDPuuh2169dd_o58oMtmGzgkk)
| | Peter, Today marks the 54th anniversary of the tragic assassination of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., whose unwavering commitment to justice, equality, and democracy continues to inspire us. King's quote "The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends towards justice," reminds us that progress may be slow, but justice will ultimately prevail. **The ongoing struggle for justice and equality demands that we dismantle systemic racism and inequality, protect voting rights and access, and create opportunities for everyone to succeed.** But the sad truth is that in recent years, we've seen democracy itself come under threat. King's words, **"****The nation is sick. Trouble is in the land; confusion all around," ring true today more than ever.** But we must not give up on democracy. We must defend and strengthen it to remain a government of the people, by the people, and for the people. As we remember Dr. King's legacy, we are reminded that injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere. So let us honor his life and work by continuing to fight for justice, equality, and democracy. Even in the face of bigotry, we have never and will never hesitate in our mission to create a government that is representative of the people it serves. The Collective PAC works every day to create the country Dr. King envisioned — and we couldn’t be more grateful to have you standing with us. Quentin James
_President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC_

* * *

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Today marks the 54th anniversary of the tragic assassination of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., whose unwavering commitment to justice, equality, and democracy continues to inspire us. King's quote "The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends towards justice," reminds us that progress may be slow, but justice will ultimately prevail. The ongoing struggle for justice and equality demands that we dismantle systemic racism and inequality, protect voting rights and access, and create opportunities for everyone to succeed. But the sad truth is that in recent years, we've seen democracy itself come under threat. King's words, "The nation is sick. Trouble is in the land; confusion all around," ring true today more than ever. But we must not give up on democracy. We must defend and strengthen it to remain a government of the people, by the people, and for the people. As we remember Dr. King's legacy, we are reminded that injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere. So let us honor his life and work by continuing to fight for justice, equality, and democracy. Even in the face of bigotry, we have never and will never hesitate in our mission to create a government that is representative of the people it serves. The Collective PAC works every day to create the country Dr. King envisioned — and we couldn’t be more grateful to have you standing with us. Quentin James President and Co-Founder of The Collective PAC | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. body:

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.

| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._MT_8M-aJQ)
---
Peter,
My father was arrested despite having committed NO CRIME.
_It's hard to believe I just typed those words. It's hard to believe something so tyrannical could happen in America... _
...But this is the reality of our country now that the Radical Left Democrats run America.
As you know - and as I've personally witnessed my entire life - my father is a WARRIOR.
_He will not let this sham indictment stop our mission to Make America Great Again! Our movement will prevail - just as we've prevailed after every other vicious attack._
