name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We can’t continue to fall short of our fundraising goals
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After last week’s end-of-quarter deadline, we were crunching the numbers
in ActBlue, and we have some disappointing news to share: So far this
year, we’ve only raised a fraction of the amount we had by this time in
2021.

In Q1 2021 — the last time we did candidate recruitment — we had raised
$523,744.38. In Q1 of 2023, we raised less than $270K.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132724?refcode=em20230404-28318&t=1001&akid=28318%2E1203867%2E6cK9GZ ]We're way behind where we were in 2021, and we need to pick things up
if we want to elect more progressives to Congress in 2024 and expand the
Squad. Peter,
will you chip in $3 now so
we can stay in this fight for the long run?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132724?refcode=em20230404-28318&t=1020&akid=28318%2E1203867%2E6cK9GZ ]Contribute $3

Our candidate recruitment is in full swing, meaning we're pouring over
thousands of submissions and talking to potential candidates across the
country to ensure we back the best possible leaders in the 2024 elections.

The candidates we recruit now, like in past years, will become progressive
champions who challenge the political establishment and fight alongside
leaders like AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee — but only if
we have the resources to support them.

We can’t continue to fall short of our fundraising goals. The success of
our 2024 Candidate Recruitment is on the line and if we fall even further
behind, we’re going to need to take a look at budget cuts for the rest of
the year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132724?refcode=em20230404-28318&t=1021&akid=28318%2E1203867%2E6cK9GZ ]Peter,
make a contribution of $3
now to help us continue our work to take on the Democratic establishment
by recruiting and electing progressive community leaders to represent us
in Congress.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28318%2E1203867%2E6cK9GZ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28318%2E1203867%2E6cK9GZ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230404-28318-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28318_1203867_6cK9GZ&akid=28318%2E1203867%2E6cK9GZ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28318%2E1203867%2E6cK9GZ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Did you see what Marjorie told Lesley Stahl? |

Did you catch Marjorie Taylor Greene on 60 Minutes, Peter? She doubled down on her accusations that all Democrats are pedophiles in the same breath that she complained about name-calling from the left. _(By the way, calling out MTG’s racism and transphobia is not “name-calling” — it’s just the truth.)_ Lesley Stahl and 60 Minutes gave Greene the mic to talk about her crossfit journey, her QAnon past, and her calls for a “national divorce” on one of the most respected news programs in the country, with very little pushback. MTG has gone from the extremist, MAGA fringes of the Republican party to front and center. Later today, she’ll be addressing a crowd outside the New York City courthouse where Donald Trump is expected to turn himself in. **She’s DANGEROUS and should have never been given a platform like the one 60 Minutes provided. We’re working overtime to combat her dangerous rhetoric and protect the communities she’s actively harming.**[_**Will you chip in now to help us drown her out?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61268882/399633525/-253429511?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230404_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRhOGExZjItMGZkMy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6HVGotUQRE7NNGFWPLsz_e8s04PvFTxUoXIbAdv4GoI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61268883/399633526/-253429511?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230404_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRhOGExZjItMGZkMy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6HVGotUQRE7NNGFWPLsz_e8s04PvFTxUoXIbAdv4GoI=)

clean_body: Did you see what Marjorie told Lesley Stahl? | = Did you catch Marjorie Taylor Greene on 60 Minutes, Peter? She doubled down on her accusations that all Democrats are pedophiles in the same breath that she complained about name-calling from the left. (By the way, calling out MTG’s racism and transphobia is not “name-calling” — it’s just the truth.) Lesley Stahl and 60 Minutes gave Greene the mic to talk about her crossfit journey, her QAnon past, and her calls for a “national divorce” on one of the most respected news programs in the country, with very little pushback. MTG has gone from the extremist, MAGA fringes of the Republican party to front and center. Later today, she’ll be addressing a crowd outside the New York City courthouse where Donald Trump is expected to turn himself in. She’s DANGEROUS and should have never been given a platform like the one 60 Minutes provided. We’re working overtime to combat her dangerous rhetoric and protect the communities she’s actively harming.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for everything, Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: PLEASE READ: Biden’s growing overreach…
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pfkT9kihge-KSgF9QVGwhq4MRII8iDQtXWLkgR0ruJUKCpyuVD05iQmczOm1JELIWLXiB79I8J4jocVBKz_TuOhJmVFcHnvgNU_HDGAJBJ3co2tJKXWEMAibDKcmfCLWS23NuhT7EQn9YhX2n78UVzPAQLhPXvMZ&c=fcz7LiTVMMBirIob9AuiPHjxYvzCaWQpyXnrIESJ9WuYagKJBwT9uQ==&ch=AFe1qx6UCPV3cIi9UyTVGdBgJ15I-PLFsbLatoPswdiyr5HKA3RE_w==)
---
| Friend

Joe Biden hasn't hesitated to reach further and further into our everyday lives, and that's why I wanted to reach out and tell you just how important it is that we fight back!
Friend President Reagan said it best when he made the infamous quote, "The nine most terrifying words in the English language are 'I'm from the government and I'm here to help." Reagan knew that our government should be kept small and removed from our everyday lives, but under Biden, that belief has been thrown out of the window!
Today, we deal with Biden's Woke ideals in our schools, face his high prices at the checkout counter, see the impacts of his anti-energy agenda at the pump, and see his propaganda on the news.
As a House Judiciary Select Subcommittee member on the Weaponization of the Federal Government, I've had a front-row seat to the fight to rein in our government. I've deposed agency bureaucrats, supported critical legislation, and worked to ensure that America stays free.
After working on expanding the IRS to target the middle class, directing the FBI to target everyday Americans, and using his powers to keep us locked down, Biden's shown he won't stop until he's reached into every American's life.
I'm committed to defending American freedom, and I refuse to step back and let Biden police the powers that our states have always held. If you want to know more about my efforts to fight for our values- take a look at the links below ->

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I’m so appreciative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi, it’s Sharice. I wanted to say thank you. Everyone who contributed to our team ahead of our first quarterly FEC deadline last week was crucial to our team hitting our goal. I’m once again a top target for National Republicans in 2024, so every bit of support we get will make a difference.

Now that Congress has been in session for about 3 months, our team is doing a reset and asking our top supporters like you to update us: have your top priorities changed since we last asked you in January?

**[We’re looking for 750 responses by close of business Friday. Can you take the time to fill me in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61272701/399638982/491237050?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230404_SV_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjMwNGFhMC0xM2QzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hnuUZ5Zw0NWCb8jEup2ljYXLdXBjY-qrTKYrHCZsi7k=&emci=7e5c3404-12d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=56304aa0-13d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)**

Last Congress, I worked with Democrats and Republicans alike to deliver results for Kansas, and this session is no different.

**[>From protecting healthcare access and reproductive rights in our state to fighting for climate justice, equality for all, and improving our local supply chains, I have delivered. In order to keep doing so, I want to hear from you today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61272702/399638983/491237050?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230404_SV_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjMwNGFhMC0xM2QzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hnuUZ5Zw0NWCb8jEup2ljYXLdXBjY-qrTKYrHCZsi7k=&emci=7e5c3404-12d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=56304aa0-13d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)** | | [Answer here→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61272704/399638984/491237050?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230404_SV_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjMwNGFhMC0xM2QzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hnuUZ5Zw0NWCb8jEup2ljYXLdXBjY-qrTKYrHCZsi7k=&emci=7e5c3404-12d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=56304aa0-13d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Another Trump disgrace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
Donald Trump has been arrested in New York. He thinks this is going to help him. Unfortunately, he may be right.
|
---
Friend, Today, history was made. Former President Trump has been indicted and surrendered to authorities in New York. And, predictably, his behavior has been disgraceful. He's posting incessant attacks on Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg online and made statements that were arguably incitements to violence. He's even fundraising off of his arrest—something I never thought I'd see in American politics. **The worst part is, it seems to be working—Trump’s support is growing stronger. ** I've been holding focus groups with Republicans all year. And for the first time, all of my participants said they would support Trump in the primary— _after_ they found out about his arrest. “As soon as I heard the news, I felt like supporting him more,” one told me. Others called it “just a smear campaign.” Right now I'm working on a major campaign to inform and persuade voters about the unique threat he poses. I'm not ready to share the details just yet, but the stakes are too high to let Trump go unchecked. We defeated him once. We’re going to defeat him again. Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC
---

clean_body: Donald Trump has been arrested in New York. He thinks this is going to help him. Unfortunately, he may be right. | Friend, Today, history was made. Former President Trump has been indicted and surrendered to authorities in New York. And, predictably, his behavior has been disgraceful. He's posting incessant attacks on Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg online and made statements that were arguably incitements to violence. He's even fundraising off of his arrest—something I never thought I'd see in American politics. The worst part is, it seems to be working—Trump’s support is growing stronger. I've been holding focus groups with Republicans all year. And for the first time, all of my participants said they would support Trump in the primary— after they found out about his arrest. “As soon as I heard the news, I felt like supporting him more,” one told me. Others called it “just a smear campaign.” Right now I'm working on a major campaign to inform and persuade voters about the unique threat he poses. I'm not ready to share the details just yet, but the stakes are too high to let Trump go unchecked. We defeated him once. We’re going to defeat him again. Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC | | Republican Accountability, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ra-pac.org

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Stand Up for Democrats, Speak Against Expulsion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/Defend%20our%20Reps%21%20%281%29.png]
*IMMEDIATE ACTION NEEDED*
Peter,
“Do your Job! Do your Job!” In the wake of yet another mass shooting, thousands gathered at our State Capitol last Thursday and chanted this refrain at every elected official in the building.
Instead of heeding the cries for gun safety from a grieving community, House Republicans are moving to expel three elected members of the General Assembly for “breaking decorum.”
During the Legislative session last Thursday, Rep. Gloria Johnson (Knoxville), Rep. Justin Jones (Nashville) and Rep. Justin J. Pearson (Memphis) stood in the House well to acknowledge the thousands of protesters calling for our State leaders to take immediate action to protect our children from preventable gun violence.
The three Democrats delayed legislative activity on the House floor for a few minutes before returning to their seats peacefully and allowing the House to finish its legislative business.
What did the House Republican Caucus do? Speaker Sexton removed the three Democrats from their committees.
Now, the House Republican Caucus is threatening extreme action to remove these Democrats from office - an act that should terrify us all. Silencing dissenting voices within our chambers is bad enough. Silencing YOUR voice by removing the people you elected must not be tolerated.
This is a GOP supermajority that refused to expel GOP members who have been charged with criminal activity while holding office and one GOP member who was accused of sexually assaulting minors. This is a GOP supermajority that still refuses to remove a member from a committee who advocated for lynching in the committee. The hypocrisy is beyond the pale.
The House Democratic Caucus unanimously supports our three colleagues, but we need your help to stand up to the GOP supermajority and its anti-Democratic actions:
FIRST: Please take a moment to sign our petition demanding Reps. Johnson, Jones, and Pearson retain their elected office. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/48Mv1zaa3U-OdnPPu9Tv1A2]
SIGN OUR PETITION! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/48Mv1zaa3U-OdnPPu9Tv1A2]
THEN: Email and call your state representative and ask them to vote against their expulsions.
FIND MY STATE REP. [https://wapp.capitol.tn.gov/apps/LegislatorInfo/directory.aspx?chamber=H]
FINALLY: Forward this email to five people and ask them to take action.
We must leave them no choice but to listen so we must get even louder.
- Chairman John Ray Clemmons
https://secure.ngpvan.com/48Mv1zaa3U-OdnPPu9Tv1A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/48Mv1zaa3U-OdnPPu9Tv1A2]
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-WXYYta9O02fOdv20S16HA2?unsubscribedata=PaRIM8B4cJvUKXi6RWvz%2Bhag378IHYkqT%2BsN%2B5LRZTEsb%2FB1M8qgwdZYiOjIjGOc4%2FiVcZ%2BY7OkPdegbFO3A2X3iPOkbjOjOEXJ518THGJ8OlxG%2FXh78EzvnSEItj04FZKBm3vzXcvQK4wX1sj3ts%2FmQ1aWOmyGFyFZs1EDnI%2BewVhF3AmOoirmh%2BqZ1aHI2erv7xkLN9rkpC2F5oW696Nlf9J11uuLrJLQf%2B5trF6W4hb2lzNaD8g5vyLptCkUEvPSmD06RQJCQZAnYj15wI9HVttnUJapDPqvBI4Dw15poIRqCpkNZkccCS%2Fa5BVj29V%2F6enNJgr9QwXzljBwnJpKSB3d6mfBI9B8CqtMYu%2BrSMJkPUKOe2BLX6uBfTDaLUCiNVBypb%2F9FMSD3Wmp%2F1%2FGzehfXxQybEOnbI%2BFqNslVd4KV9gI9TGjSd4CLbFN0 .

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. It’s hard to believe it’s come to this.
What was once a country _of, by,_ and _for_ the people is now run by left-wing radicals who would arrest a United States president and their leading opponent NOT for committing a crime, but for putting YOU – the America People – first.
But I know my father’s resolve is stronger than ever.
And I wanted to reach out to his biggest supporters on this dark day to let you know that he’s never been more committed to WINNING BACK the White House and SAVING our country.
My father has always been a warrior, and rest assured, _he will NEVER SURRENDER our great country to the Left’s tyranny._
You see, the Democrats believe their witch hunts will end the America First Movement.
They couldn't be more wrong!
_My father knows it, you know it, and by this time tomorrow, our movement will be twice as strong and more united than ever before._
**Which is why I want to show him a list of ALL the patriots who stepped up to peacefully defend our incredible movement during these unprecedented and dark times.**

clean_body: It’s URGENT... | | | Friend, It’s hard to believe it’s come to this. What was once a country of, by, and for the people is now run by left-wing radicals who would arrest a United States president and their leading opponent NOT for committing a crime, but for putting YOU – the America People – first. But I know my father’s resolve is stronger than ever. And I wanted to reach out to his biggest supporters on this dark day to let you know that he’s never been more committed to WINNING BACK the White House and SAVING our country. My father has always been a warrior, and rest assured, he will NEVER SURRENDER our great country to the Left’s tyranny. You see, the Democrats believe their witch hunts will end the America First Movement. They couldn't be more wrong! My father knows it, you know it, and by this time tomorrow, our movement will be twice as strong and more united than ever before. Which is why I want to show him a list of ALL the patriots who stepped up to peacefully defend our incredible movement during these unprecedented and dark times. Thank you for all of your support – and God bless you, Eric Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach another fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18923?t=1001&akid=3118%2E346206%2E-Gv0MV ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18923?t=1002&akid=3118%2E346206%2E-Gv0MV ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230404-3118-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3118_346206_-Gv0MV&akid=3118%2E346206%2E-Gv0MV

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
clean_body: Peter, As we approach another fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our campaign debt. I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight together. First, I need your help. [ ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a contribution before midnight. Thank you! Charles --- Forwarded message --- Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the democratic process. The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky. Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will win. But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of donations we received, national support never came. [ ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to make a contribution. I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to go. Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m excited to move on to what’s next. Charles Contribute to Charles Booker:

Hey there, As the Moore-Miller administration works on wrapping up the legislative session with our partners in the General Assembly, we have more updates on the progress we’ve made together this past week. [**Watch last week’s ‘More From Moore’ video update for all the details >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61278444/399642544/-803653937?v=Oqo0HB9JNu0&t=1s&ab_channel=GovernorWesMoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjkyMTVmMS0xOGQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAF056dc76OXKrYyVNjMLnpS5SDd3OOMVI-KOfNEzQc=&emci=fd9115f1-18d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=029215f1-18d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61278446/399642546/-803653937?v=Oqo0HB9JNu0&t=1s&ab_channel=GovernorWesMoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjkyMTVmMS0xOGQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAF056dc76OXKrYyVNjMLnpS5SDd3OOMVI-KOfNEzQc=&emci=fd9115f1-18d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=029215f1-18d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
Last week, Wes:
* Addressed leaders in the green energy industry in Baltimore to make it clear that **Maryland will become the offshore wind capitol of the country** , as we fight climate change, create good-paying jobs, and move toward a clean energy future.

* Became the first governor in our state’s history to issue a proclamation **declaring March 31 as Transgender Day of Visibility** , to recognize the beauty and strength of a community that embodies the best of Maryland. He also plans to sign the **Trans Health Equity Act** when it arrives at his desk to require Maryland Medicaid to provide coverage for additional gender-affirming treatments.

* **Named March Multiple Sclerosis Month in the state of Maryland** in support of the thousands of Marylanders living with M.S., including his sister and his wife, Dawn, who recently shared her courageous M.S. journey.

**Plus, Wes was named one of Politico’s 40 most powerful people on race and politics![Check out the full feature here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61278447/399642548/-277060839?slug=wes-moore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjkyMTVmMS0xOGQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAF056dc76OXKrYyVNjMLnpS5SDd3OOMVI-KOfNEzQc=&emci=fd9115f1-18d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=029215f1-18d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)**
Our state is moving forward, leading with innovation and love to build one Maryland. Thank you for being a part of our movement.
— Team Moore-Miller

Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.

Here’s the honest truth about why we need to stay consistent with our fundraising.
If we fall short on even a single goal, we risk having that deficit snowball into the coming months, hurting our chances of holding this seat down the line. **That’s why I mean it when I say that every dollar we raise ahead of the election matters.**
The GOP and their dark money backers are creating their game plan to drown Nevada in a red wave in 2024. So, the organizing work that you’re helping fund right now is crucial to building a grassroots movement that uplifts every Nevadan.
We’re the first line of defense against the Republican Party’s efforts to retake the Silver State, making it crucial that we stay on top of our fundraising efforts.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61281166/399645734/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDIzMGI0YS0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=weYAMLFw0VNkQDi4H_3lsR9w1eeoz8de1EV2g04Jm2w=&emci=3d7cf143-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c4230b4a-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
Peter,
**The _New York Times_ is reporting: "former President Donald Trump turned himself in at the district attorney’s office in Lower Manhattan."**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61281167/399645735/-959746950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDIzMGI0YS0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=weYAMLFw0VNkQDi4H_3lsR9w1eeoz8de1EV2g04Jm2w=)
This is big news. Trump’s indictment by a grand jury of everyday citizens shows that no one is above the law.
But this is far from the only crime Trump must be held accountable for. As a member of the House Oversight Committee, we should be examining all the ways Trump broke the law while in office—including his efforts to threaten our very democracy.
**Can you help have me and my team’s back in this fight?[Chip in $15 now, or whatever you can, to help support our work defending democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61281168/399645736/-959746950?refcode2=c4230b4a-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDIzMGI0YS0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=weYAMLFw0VNkQDi4H_3lsR9w1eeoz8de1EV2g04Jm2w=)**
****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61281169/399645737/-959746950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDIzMGI0YS0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=weYAMLFw0VNkQDi4H_3lsR9w1eeoz8de1EV2g04Jm2w=)****
---

Peter, Trump’s indictment is long-awaited news. His corrupt business practices are well-known, but he has long avoided accountability under the law. This is an important first step in shining a light on his potential crimes in front of a jury of his peers.
But this is not the only investigation into Trump’s wrongdoings. Trump is also under investigation in Georgia for his efforts to pressure local officials to overturn 2020 election results. And the DOJ is also investigating Trump’s role in inciting the insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.
These are exactly the kind of things we should be investigating on the House Oversight Committee. But instead, Republicans in the majority are using our committee as a political weapon to promote anti-vaccine conspiracy theories, demonizing immigrants, or complaining about their twitter following.

**My Democratic colleagues and I are pushing back hard – but we need support from people like you to continue our work.****[Can you chip in $20, or whatever you can, to help me and my team defend our democracy? Our work has never been more important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61281170/399645738/-959746950?refcode2=c4230b4a-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDIzMGI0YS0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=weYAMLFw0VNkQDi4H_3lsR9w1eeoz8de1EV2g04Jm2w=)**

Thank you,
-Greg
****
Greg Casar
Congressman
Texas Congressional District 35

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: For Elissa Slotkin, politics is personal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | a third-generation Michigander, a national security leader, and a life-long public servant [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61281407/399645861/541775293?sourceid=1048859&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWY3Yzc3Ny0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wEN2KCM__DRw4vY05QxG8o8Y1BeWC2jmGjT3_7Yj8ys=&emci=027c3971-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09f7c777-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter, we couldn't be prouder to endorse Elissa Slotkin in her race to be the next senator from Michigan.

Rep. Slotkin's commitment to abortion access and voting rights is unparalleled. And her experience working in national security and fighting for economic opportunity makes her both a strong candidate _and_ a legislator we can count on. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61281409/399645862/541775293?sourceid=1048859&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWY3Yzc3Ny0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wEN2KCM__DRw4vY05QxG8o8Y1BeWC2jmGjT3_7Yj8ys=&emci=027c3971-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09f7c777-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Elissa is a third-generation Michigander, a national security leader, and a life-long public servant.

In the aftermath of the 9/11 attacks, she was recruited to join the CIA as a Middle East analyst. Working alongside the U.S. military, she served a total of _three tours_ in Iraq over a span of five years. She has held a variety of defense and intelligence roles — under both President Bush and President Obama — at the White House, the Office of the Director of National Intelligence, the State Department, and the Pentagon.

The reason Elissa first ran for office was personal: Her mother died of ovarian cancer in 2011, after struggling in her final years to afford health care because insurance companies had gouged her based on a pre-existing condition. A few years later, in 2017, Elissa watched the two-term incumbent from her district _smile_ at a White House celebration after he and other House Republicans voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and her mind was made up: she decided to run against him that cycle — and she won.

We were proud to support Elissa in that 2018 congressional campaign, and in her battles to hold the seat in 2020 and 2022. So of course, when she began weighing a Senate run in 2024, we were _all in_. ****Elissa Slotkin is ready to fight for all of Michigan's rights in the U.S. Senate. Donate now to help elect candidates like Elissa across the country in 2023 and 2024:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61281421/399645869/541775293?sourceid=1048859&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWY3Yzc3Ny0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wEN2KCM__DRw4vY05QxG8o8Y1BeWC2jmGjT3_7Yj8ys=&emci=027c3971-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09f7c777-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)
Senior Vice President, Campaigns, EMILYs List
** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61281426/399645871/541775293?sourceid=1048859&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWY3Yzc3Ny0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wEN2KCM__DRw4vY05QxG8o8Y1BeWC2jmGjT3_7Yj8ys=&emci=027c3971-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09f7c777-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61281428/399645872/-42672674?sourceid=1048859&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWY3Yzc3Ny0xYmQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wEN2KCM__DRw4vY05QxG8o8Y1BeWC2jmGjT3_7Yj8ys=&emci=027c3971-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09f7c777-1bd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** ********

name: Replace Sinema
subject: RE: Biden forced to issue veto on Sinema bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
Sinema sided with Republicans instead of AZ farmers | |

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m doing everything in my power to fight gun violence and protect North Carolinians. The legislature is undoing our progress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is egregious.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61285015/399648238/823540626?refcode=ea.dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWMwNWI2ZS0xZWQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KkPqVmXKfHm8SJ9Zr4gs9jZGK6wQrwnvjitaEInckg4=&emci=f042a4aa-f6d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter, the evidence is clear: We have **a gun violence crisis.** And we need to act. Firearm injury has surpassed car accidents as the leading cause of death in children. Month after month, communities across the country are torn apart by school shootings. We know we need positive change now, but Republicans fight us at every step and even push us backward to ease safeguards on guns to make them easier to get into the wrong hands. **We cannot accept this.** **[Join me and call on the legislature to follow the data and enact commonsense gun violence prevention solutions before more of our communities suffer.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61285016/399648239/970892624?refcode=ea.dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWMwNWI2ZS0xZWQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KkPqVmXKfHm8SJ9Zr4gs9jZGK6wQrwnvjitaEInckg4=&emci=f042a4aa-f6d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** Peter, I am doing whatever I can to protect our children and our communities. I recently signed an executive order establishing the Office of Violence Prevention for North Carolina because I am committed to fighting gun violence and protecting our people. **Meanwhile, just days after the massacre in Nashville, our GOP-controlled General Assembly voted to _roll back_ protections against gun violence. It’s an egregious example of putting the priorities of the gun lobby over the safety of our people.** Peter, solving any public health crisis relies on following the data and employing best practices. And make no mistake: gun violence _is_ a public health crisis. An average of five North Carolinians a day die from firearm injury. All of us deserve to feel safe in our homes, schools, and communities. That’s why Democratic lawmakers continue to propose reasonable reforms — like stronger background checks and red flag laws — that would _save lives._ **[It’s time for Republicans to set aside their loyalty to the gun lobby and join with Democrats to institute necessary reforms — instead of making it easier for dangerous people to get their hands on guns. Sign on to stand with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61285017/399648240/970892624?refcode=ea.dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWMwNWI2ZS0xZWQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KkPqVmXKfHm8SJ9Zr4gs9jZGK6wQrwnvjitaEInckg4=&emci=f042a4aa-f6d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61285018/399648241/970892624?refcode=ea.dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWMwNWI2ZS0xZWQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KkPqVmXKfHm8SJ9Zr4gs9jZGK6wQrwnvjitaEInckg4=&emci=f042a4aa-f6d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=dec05b6e-1ed3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: This is egregious. | Peter, the evidence is clear: We have a gun violence crisis. And we need to act. Firearm injury has surpassed car accidents as the leading cause of death in children. Month after month, communities across the country are torn apart by school shootings. We know we need positive change now, but Republicans fight us at every step and even push us backward to ease safeguards on guns to make them easier to get into the wrong hands. We cannot accept this. Peter, I am doing whatever I can to protect our children and our communities. I recently signed an executive order establishing the Office of Violence Prevention for North Carolina because I am committed to fighting gun violence and protecting our people. Meanwhile, just days after the massacre in Nashville, our GOP-controlled General Assembly voted to roll back protections against gun violence. It’s an egregious example of putting the priorities of the gun lobby over the safety of our people. Peter, solving any public health crisis relies on following the data and employing best practices. And make no mistake: gun violence is a public health crisis. An average of five North Carolinians a day die from firearm injury. All of us deserve to feel safe in our homes, schools, and communities. That’s why Democratic lawmakers continue to propose reasonable reforms — like stronger background checks and red flag laws — that would save lives. | Thanks for making your voice heard on this critical issue, Roy ****=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Join TVP To Resist the Expulsions of Reps. Johnson, Jones, and Pearson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
April 4, 2023
Dear friend,
Today marks the 55th anniversary of voting & civil rights leader Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.'s assassination and the TN General Assembly is seeking to subvert the will of voters in West, Middle, and East Tennessee .
In the spirit of Dr. King, Representatives Gloria Johnson, Justin Jones, and Justin J. Pearson led a peaceful protest on the House floor among countless parents and youth in response to the tragic school shooting in Nashville last week. Now, the GOP has put up resolutions to vote on these members' expulsions as early as THIS Thursday, April 6.
This effort is nothing less than an attempt to undermine our democracy.
ASK TN GOP TO NOT EXPEL REPS. JOHNSON, JONES, AND PEARSON [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/join-tvp-to-preserve-democracy-and-resist-the-expulsion-of-reps-johnson-jones-and-pearson?source=direct_link&]
These Representatives disrupted the status quo to call attention to our legislature's deadly inaction. As they were duly elected to do, they stood with their constituents to demand that our legislature pass common sense gun reform and ensure another family faces this tragedy again.
Expelling members for doing the right thing sets a dangerous precedent.
Please join TVP in reaching out to your Representatives TODAY to request that they do not expel Representatives Johnson, Jones, and Pearson [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/join-tvp-to-preserve-democracy-and-resist-the-expulsion-of-reps-johnson-jones-and-pearson?source=direct_link&] .
In Service of Democracy,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

This news of Trump’s indictment is fueling his MAGA base nationwide – from Kevin McCarthy calling Trump’s indictment “political vengeance” to rallies happening from Florida to Manhattan. His Republican allies are more energized than ever to continue his attacks on our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy in statehouses across the country.

**We need grassroots Democrats to come together right now to help us build unstoppable momentum for state Democrats and stop Trump’s right-wing cronies from taking power.**
[Rush $7 now to show Trump and his state Republican allies that Democrats are ready to stop their right-wing agenda in its tracks >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OEG5Nd9M1zrXCmZSraeirsc7wpm2SOqToZ4r0yAvOHi_JJvxBSC-zcY6s6bl9CU3VgzgETlujGnKvvi9Yl20OHFD7odDX27O80GxQbOyiZlj5j-32TcjOg5VleAvRrgCOSlYnCo4m47xIM24-EiMfcGkv9peazHoJLfZ-0YshQmt3QXSgCRPuifZFsOUeHnx8dOR1vZwfcUS84K87V1JVLyol6qx3z2rGnLn6PradGVTi69eUg8UhWvoOhSjyqLzkIt34VrA6LVDrdqw1abYsjRn8z1uJlYiE77sno3ZyOcA9rR4wb6M2bGY8HLdfoonaDAMqJ53gMmIdw9H2guezEE/3v2/NzTo67MGSzqgxAzq0sWc7Q/h6/pCVRlpwsxmLGM8aUjOj0zo9aGBzqVvXvFouaUaJq210)

We need grassroots Democrats to come together right now to help us build unstoppable momentum for state Democrats and stop Trump’s right-wing cronies from taking power. We have a long road ahead. body:
Friend, I wanted to express my deep appreciation for everything you have done for our movement and future. Because of your support, we reached our end-of-quarter grassroots budget target last month. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61286042/399650215/1821803152?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjBmM2NlMC0yMWQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXDI56jZFT9Q2_RYhg5BsRdR8eq5NQ2S1kFU9YyGS2w=)

Friend,
I wanted to express my deep appreciation for everything you have done for our movement and future. Because of your support, we reached our end-of-quarter grassroots budget target last month.
My campaign has always relied heavily on grassroots contributions. It’s not the easiest path to take, but it’s one we walk together to ensure our campaign is powered by people, not powerful special interests.
Nothing I do is possible without you, and I can’t thank you enough for stepping up once again. Time and time again, this team has come through for us when we needed it most.
We have a lot more work ahead of us, but as long as you’re with me, I know we can overcome any challenge that comes our way.
Thank you for everything,
Keith Ellison

body:
Get Your Copy Wherever Books are Sold | | | [ ](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=b962f6a7f1&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | **April is Autism Awareness Month**... Each year during the month of April, individuals and organizations across the globe celebrate Autism Awareness Month with events to educate local communities and raise public awareness about autism. Almost 50 years have passed since the Autism Society held the first National Autism Awareness Month in April of 1970. Since then, autism has become the fastest-growing diagnosis in the world, with the diagnosis rate of children with autism increasing from 1 in every 10,000 children in the 1970s and 1980s to 1 in every 36 children today. For any parent who has heard the words "your child has autism," Warrior Mom offers hope, inspiration, and very specific advice to help parents navigate the system, evaluate different treatment options, and heal their child's underlying conditions.
---

I am truly grateful for all the love and support everyone has shown toward me as I prepared to release my book Warrior Mom. This book is going to change many lives! Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!

Almost 50 years have passed since the Autism Society held the first National Autism Awareness Month in April of 1970. Since then, autism has become the fastest-growing diagnosis in the world, with the diagnosis rate of children with autism increasing from 1 in every 10,000 children in the 1970s and 1980s to 1 in every 36 children today. For any parent who has heard the words "your child has autism," Warrior Mom offers hope, inspiration, and very specific advice to help parents navigate the system, evaluate different treatment options, and heal their child's underlying conditions. | | | | Today is the BIG day! Warrior Mom is now available for purchase online and in bookstores. It has been a long but beautiful road to get here. I am truly grateful for all the love and support everyone has shown toward me as I prepared to release my book Warrior Mom. This book is going to change many lives! Thank you! Thank you! Thank you! | "Buy Now" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@warriormom.org | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Warrior Mom 5857 Owens Ave Ste. 300 Carlsbad, CA 92008 USA

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Katie vs. TurboTax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
You shouldn’t have to pay to file your taxes.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=20599%2E3422442%2ESB9Dlc)
Did you see Katie’s tweet, Derek?
| **Katie Porter** @katieporteroc
---|---
| | | Taxes can and should be free and easy to file, but corporate special interests like @Intuit have long lobbied Congress to keep filing difficult so they can pad their pockets. I have a bill that would finally let the IRS develop a free, easy filing service that everyone can use.
---
Katie introduced a bill to create free and easy tax filing tools that anyone can use (instead of shelling out for services like TurboTax).
That’s right, Derek. The IRS already has all of the information it needs to calculate tax liabilities and refunds—but corporate special interests like TurboTax have lobbied Congress for years to allow them to keep wasting taxpayers’ time and money to line their pockets.
Katie doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. We run a grassroots campaign supported by working people like you, and Katie will always stand up for what’s right.
[**Can you show your support for Katie by making a donation towards our campaign today? When we send Katie to the Senate, she’ll always hold Big Corporations and Congress accountable.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230404-1?refcode=%7B%7Bhtml_custom_fields.refcode|urlencode}&refcode2=20599_3422442_SB9Dlc&akid=20599%2E3422442%2ESB9Dlc)

subject: The latest attack on abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **BREAKING: Trump-appointed judge could issue a _"devastating"_ BAN on abortion pills nationwide!**
_The far-right’s attack on abortion is only getting started, and Democrats need to take a stand._
**[Republicans will not stop until abortion is COMPLETELY banned, so please: Sign our petition supporting reproductive rights before midnight>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12708?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230404-ResponseNeeded-AbortionPillRoeFTN-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230404-ResponseNeeded-AbortionPillRoeFTN-ETG-sl1&akid=10343%2E9716520%2EqiQ1OC)**
| Your ID | 9716520
---|---
Signature | MISSING
Deadline | MIDNIGHT

| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/12708?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230404-ResponseNeeded-AbortionPillRoeFTN-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230404-ResponseNeeded-AbortionPillRoeFTN-ETG-sl1&akid=10343%2E9716520%2EqiQ1OC)
---

Team, reproductive rights EVERYWHERE are in _serious_ danger:

**FIRST:** The right-wing Supreme Court majority overturned _Roe v. Wade,_ gutting abortion access for _millions._

**THEN:** Ultra-conservative Republican legislators in 24 states _immediately_ began moving to limit and even _outlaw_ abortion.

**AND NOW:** They want to take their attacks _nationwide_ \-- a Trump-appointed judge in Texas **could ban a safe, at-home medication that is used in over 50% of abortions!**

We need to act NOW, before this fundamental right is stripped back _even further._ **We’re trying to collect 250,000 signatures by MIDNIGHT on our petition to protect reproductive freedom, but we’re still missing your name!**

**[Please, sign our _urgent_ petition to defend reproductive rights from the far-right’s endless attacks!](https://go.dscc.org/go/12708?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230404-ResponseNeeded-AbortionPillRoeFTN-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230404-ResponseNeeded-AbortionPillRoeFTN-ETG-sl1&akid=10343%2E9716520%2EqiQ1OC)**

name: Team DPVA
subject: We’re asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
|
---
Derek, We’re proud of our Democratic accomplishments for the last few years — Virginia has led the way in the South on abortion rights, voting rights, legalizing marijuana, and criminal justice reform. But the Virginia GOP wants to roll back all of the progress we’ve worked so hard for. The Democratic Party of Virginia is committed to building a brighter future for all Virginians. We want to create jobs, provide quality healthcare, invest in education, and protect our environment. [**But we can't protect our progress alone. We need your support to elect candidates who share our vision and will fight for our values. Will you pitch in your support to keep progress rolling in Virginia?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61287464/399658854/-361892355?refcode=dpva-em-230404-brightfuture&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmQ5OWY5Zi0yN2QzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flMQnX7v4eiyPVV6hAeGqlVnUoL_guvqKIvMPzWKIhA=) Your donation to the Democratic Party of Virginia will help us fund critical programs and run effective campaigns. We'll use your contribution to hire staff, run ads, and organize that will help us get out the vote and win on Election Day. Whether you can donate $5 or $500, every dollar counts. We need grassroots support from folks like you to take us to victory in November. Let's work together to build a better Virginia for all. Thank you for your continued support. name: FLASH POLL
subject: Masculinity in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | **SIX-HOUR FLASH POLL**

**We need YOUR input!**

Liberals in America seem to want to eliminate masculine men from society. They think masculinity is toxic, but do you?

We want to know from you:

name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: Tell Your Representatives: Support the Environmental Justice for All Act NOW.
body:
Help us reach our goal to deliver 5,000 petition signatures to Capitol Hill. |
---
| | **
Tell Congress: Support the
Environmental Justice for All Act ____**
For far too long, communities of color and low-wealth communities have been hit hardest by pollution and the climate crisis. Congress has the opportunity to use federal policy to empower these communities by addressing environmental racism, ensuring communities have a say in the development of local federal projects, providing funds for urban parks, and more.

[Tell Congress to act to rectify historical environmental racism.
Pass the Environmental Justice for All Act.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecwW_kmsW/dlR1UUZ5MVpTOThEeGlZVjVrRVBlbnloYXREcE9NaUVzeHliWTExMlYrTXlBKzIvRGNkMGdOMURsSm0ycVd3Nm9GY3NtQ2g3U2dSY0wvVlM5UVRUcHI5cGJackc0TGt1R2t1ZHdBZWZsVVE9S0/UGdVb2JnNkJkTFVDRnBaQnNhN250V3BDQSt1bnZBWFVHYmF6NDg3aC9KNWthdTdZK2I3Sm83RndvcVhtWkpZQmhOZlJRV1ZqMlhmS1pTN2I1NDRMZEtFWk9tWGNJejFES0)

**GOAL: 5,000 Actions** |
---
**[**TAKE ACTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecwW_kmsW/dlR1UUZ5MVpTOThEeGlZVjVrRVBlbnloYXREcE9NaUVzeHliWTExMlYrTXlBKzIvRGNkMGdOMURsSm0ycVd3Nm9GY3NtQ2g3U2dSY0wvVlM5UVRUcHI5cGJackc0TGt1R2t1ZHdBZWZsVVE9S0/UGdVb2JnNkJkTFVDRnBaQnNhN250V3BDQSt1bnZBWFVHYmF6NDg3aC9KNWthdTdZK2I3Sm83RndvcVhtWkpZQmhOZlJRV1ZqMlhmS1pTN2I1NDRMZEtFWk9tWGNJejFES0)**

** **
|
Peter -- right now, Congress has a historic opportunity to address generations of systemic and persistent environmental racism directed at communities of color and low-wealth communities, while empowering those communities to protect against further harms.

The A. Donald McEachin Environmental Justice for All Act -- one of the first environmental policies drafted in collaboration with affected communities -- has just been reintroduced. The bill's name honors the late Congressman Donald McEachin of Virginia, a long-standing champion for environmental justice, who passed away last November.

The legislation would **prohibit projects that have a disparate environmental impact** on the basis of race, color, or national origin. It would also require federal agencies to evaluate together all the air and water pollution facing environmental justice communities and take protective actions, while also **providing funding for urban parks.** Finally, in addition to these important anti-racist policies, this sweeping environmental justice legislation would **ensure that community input is central to the development of _all new energy projects_.**

[It is critical that Congress acts to address long-standing inequities in our environmental safeguards and empower communities to protect against pollution. Take action today: demand that your representatives co-sponsor the Environmental Justice for All Act.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecwW_kmsW/dlR1UUZ5MVpTOThEeGlZVjVrRVBlbnloYXREcE9NaUVzeHliWTExMlYrTXlBKzIvRGNkMGdOMURsSm0ycVd3Nm9GY3NtQ2g3U2dSY0wvVlM5UVRUcHI5cGJackc0TGt1R2t1ZHdBZWZsVVE9S0/UGdVb2JnNkJkTFVDRnBaQnNhN250V3BDQSt1bnZBWFVHYmF6NDg3aC9KNWthdTdZK2I3Sm83RndvcVhtWkpZQmhOZlJRV1ZqMlhmS1pTN2I1NDRMZEtFWk9tWGNJejFES0)

Justice is long overdue for communities of color and low-wealth communities experiencing a disproportionate share of pollution and climate degradation. For one of the first times in U.S. history, communities that have long been excluded from policymaking are now at the table, collaborating with elected officials and leading the conversations to craft this critical legislation.

It is imperative that Congress continue to listen to their voices by passing the Environmental Justice for All Act and prioritizing equitable solutions that reduce pollution in overburdened communities and strengthen communities' right to protect themselves against environmental racism.

[Help us reach 5,000 signatures demanding action on environmental racism. Tell your member of Congress to cosponsor and push for passage of the Environmental Justice for All Act to address and prevent environmental inequities, make our communities safer, and provide more outdoor opportunities in historically underserved urban areas.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecwW_kmsW/dlR1UUZ5MVpTOThEeGlZVjVrRVBlbnloYXREcE9NaUVzeHliWTExMlYrTXlBKzIvRGNkMGdOMURsSm0ycVd3Nm9GY3NtQ2g3U2dSY0wvVlM5UVRUcHI5cGJackc0TGt1R2t1ZHdBZWZsVVE9S0/UGdVb2JnNkJkTFVDRnBaQnNhN250V3BDQSt1bnZBWFVHYmF6NDg3aC9KNWthdTdZK2I3Sm83RndvcVhtWkpZQmhOZlJRV1ZqMlhmS1pTN2I1NDRMZEtFWk9tWGNJejFES0)

Congress must _finally_ seize this opportunity to listen to communities impacted by environmental racism and collaborate on solutions to address inequities. This will be the first of many steps to address these long-standing injustices.

Thank you for standing with environmental justice communities and advocates.

Onward,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters |

---

Friend,
I’m writing you this email as I fly back home to Mar-a-Lago.
While we are living through the darkest hours of American history, I can say that at least for this moment right now, I am in great spirits...
...Because my team showed me all of the support, the love, the prayers, and the donations YOU gave our movement while I was getting arrested and arraigned.
You are why I could _**NEVER**_ give up our mission to save America – no matter how nasty and vicious the attacks ever got.
_**Since news of the indictment first broke, I’ve been informed that our campaign has raised over $10,000,000.**_
We outraised every single Democrat – **COMBINED**. And it’s all thanks to donors giving $1, $5, $24, $47, $100...
I have never been more certain that we will win back the White House and save our Great Nation.
_**Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**_

clean_body: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | | Friend, I’m writing you this email as I fly back home to Mar-a-Lago. While we are living through the darkest hours of American history, I can say that at least for this moment right now, I am in great spirits... ...Because my team showed me all of the support, the love, the prayers, and the donations YOU gave our movement while I was getting arrested and arraigned. You are why I could NEVER give up our mission to save America – no matter how nasty and vicious the attacks ever got. Since news of the indictment first broke, I’ve been informed that our campaign has raised over $10,000,000. We outraised every single Democrat – COMBINED. And it’s all thanks to donors giving $1, $5, $24, $47, $100... I have never been more certain that we will win back the White House and save our Great Nation. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, | - Donald J. body:
Josh Hawley needs to go. | | | Hi Peter – If you're familiar with Josh Hawley, we're sorry. If you're not, we'll give you a quick introduction. Hawley is a far-right Missouri senator who led the GOP's effort in the Senate to contest the 2020 election. He was the only senator to vote against a bill that would address hate crimes against Asian Americans after horrendous attacks during COVID-19. He also voted against providing $2.8 billion in relief to his own constituents in Missouri. **So now you know, Peter – Josh Hawley is a danger to our democracy and the American people. Lucas Kunce is the Democrat running against Hawley's 2024 reelection campaign.** Lucas is a 13-year Marine veteran, Missouri native, national security expert, and anticorruption advocate. He's running a race without corporate interest funding – unlike Hawley – and is fighting to bring his commitment to hard work and public service to Washington. **Missourians want this change, Peter.** Voters passed initiatives championed by Democrats — increase the minimum wage, expand health care, repeal an anti-worker “Right-to-Work” scheme, legalize weed, and enact more protections against political corruption. It's time Missourians get a leader who will fight for those critical issues at the national level. **_[Josh Hawley is no easy target, and Lucas needs all the help he can get, Peter. clean_body: Josh Hawley needs to go. | | | Hi Peter – If you're familiar with Josh Hawley, we're sorry. If you're not, we'll give you a quick introduction. Hawley is a far-right Missouri senator who led the GOP's effort in the Senate to contest the 2020 election. He was the only senator to vote against a bill that would address hate crimes against Asian Americans after horrendous attacks during COVID-19. He also voted against providing $2.8 billion in relief to his own constituents in Missouri. So now you know, Peter – Josh Hawley is a danger to our democracy and the American people. Lucas Kunce is the Democrat running against Hawley's 2024 reelection campaign. Lucas is a 13-year Marine veteran, Missouri native, national security expert, and anticorruption advocate. He's running a race without corporate interest funding – unlike Hawley – and is fighting to bring his commitment to hard work and public service to Washington. Missourians want this change, Peter. Voters passed initiatives championed by Democrats — increase the minimum wage, expand health care, repeal an anti-worker “Right-to-Work” scheme, legalize weed, and enact more protections against political corruption. It's time Missourians get a leader who will fight for those critical issues at the national level. Thank you for your support, Peter. – United Rural Democrats HQ United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Team NPP
subject: We couldn’t do this without you

body:
Thank you for being a part of our movement.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61287716/399660080/550347785?refcode=EM_C_230404EOQTY_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhZTBhOWQ5LTI5ZDMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X3grFzCROaVsoGFk4w0Y1puuvxAla9Y48_kuzrrB418=)
| Fellow activist,

Over the last couple of weeks, we have been emailing quite urgently for your help to defend our progress and continue our work of consistent voter engagement across the Commonwealth. Today, we’re writing to thank you.

Empowering new voters from historically disenfranchised and neglected communities to show up to the polls in Pennsylvania is not an easy task. It’s thanks to your continuous support we are able to do so much. We are deeply thankful to you for being a part of our movement to expand the electorate.

Our democracy works best when everyone's voice is heard – including; Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth. Our work will continue until we see true representation at the polls and in our elected officials.

It is comforting to know that thousands of people are just as dedicated as we are to transforming the Commonwealth for the better. No matter the challenges, we know we are always able to count on you to stay engaged in this fight.

Truly, none of our accomplishments could have been achieved without your continuous support. Thank you.

In solidarity,

Team NPP [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61287717/399660081/550347785?refcode=EM_C_230404EOQTY_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_Signoff&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhZTBhOWQ5LTI5ZDMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X3grFzCROaVsoGFk4w0Y1puuvxAla9Y48_kuzrrB418=) **[P.S. Again, thank you for everything. We have our work cut out for us in 2023, and we need to avoid any more budget issues to set us up for success. clean_body: Thank you for being a part of our movement. = | Fellow activist, Over the last couple of weeks, we have been emailing quite urgently for your help to defend our progress and continue our work of consistent voter engagement across the Commonwealth. Today, we’re writing to thank you. Empowering new voters from historically disenfranchised and neglected communities to show up to the polls in Pennsylvania is not an easy task. It’s thanks to your continuous support we are able to do so much. We are deeply thankful to you for being a part of our movement to expand the electorate. Our democracy works best when everyone's voice is heard – including; Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth. Our work will continue until we see true representation at the polls and in our elected officials. It is comforting to know that thousands of people are just as dedicated as we are to transforming the Commonwealth for the better. No matter the challenges, we know we are always able to count on you to stay engaged in this fight. Truly, none of our accomplishments could have been achieved without your continuous support. Thank you. In solidarity, Team NPP = = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

Team – I wanted to share the great news! I just met with my team, and thanks to all of you we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. _Thank you for stepping up._ I say this all the time, because it’s true: **For this people-powered campaign, everyone’s donations really add up.** I’m proud to be supported by folks chipping in [**$5, $10 or $15**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61287842/399660432/-388004332?refcode=em_eng_2023.04.04_b1_as_all-nd&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjQ4OTAzNi0yYWQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFXP1knNsZ15ivV8gOMCH0I_GGgwOvPKjKtV1qDF_-c=) whenever they can afford to. name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Thank you, thank you, thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Thanks to the generosity of grassroots supporters like you, we were able to surpass our first end-of-quarter goal. This was a defining moment for our re-election campaign – and we met that moment with the unity and strength we’ll need to keep Northeast Ohio blue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61288695/399663587/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.04.04_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWU2Y2FjYS0yY2QzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIoeiBMq5KkVB9o5-68iHiyqWdxuum_oPrfEj2I3Mxg=)
Peter, I can’t thank you enough!

Thanks to the generosity of grassroots supporters like you, we were able to surpass our first end-of-quarter goal.

**This was a defining moment for our re-election campaign** – _and we met that moment with the unity and strength we’ll need to keep Northeast Ohio blue._

I know the road ahead won’t be easy, but with you on our team, I’m more confident than ever that we can bring home another win to the Birthplace of Champions. And for that, I say: Thank you, thank you, thank you.

I’m endlessly grateful to be in this fight with you.

Onward,

Emilia

---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61288696/399663588/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.04.04_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWU2Y2FjYS0yY2QzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIoeiBMq5KkVB9o5-68iHiyqWdxuum_oPrfEj2I3Mxg=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61288697/399663589/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.04.04_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWU2Y2FjYS0yY2QzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIoeiBMq5KkVB9o5-68iHiyqWdxuum_oPrfEj2I3Mxg=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I wanted to share some thoughts with you as I watch some of this TV coverage.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2064%2E5257348%2E7efM4x)
Derek — today is a really somber day. And I wanted to share some thoughts with you as I watch some of this TV coverage.
It’s not a scene I would ever have imagined — a former U.S. president photographed, finger-printed and arraigned in court. Some of his most fervent supporters on the street trying to stir up trouble.
It’s a sobering reminder of how fragile our democracy really is, and how important it is for all of us to do our part to make sure it survives for another generation.
We don’t know what the next days, weeks and months will bring. But already, Republicans in Congress are seeking to obstruct both this court proceeding, and other serious criminal investigations into Trump’s misconduct stemming from January 6th and his mishandling of classified information.
Jim Jordan, the Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee, has threatened to subpoena the Manhattan District Attorney in an effort to disrupt the proceedings. I sit on the Judiciary Committee, and let me tell you, we will fight this — or any other — attempt to interfere with the administration of justice.
**_We can’t — and won’t — let Republicans succeed in preventing accountability. Not if the rule of law is to mean anything._**
If we are to remain a nation of laws, we must hold the rich and powerful accountable, just as we would anyone else.
_To do otherwise is not justice, and it is not democracy._
Thanks again for standing strong through all of this, and for your support.
Adam

name: HelenGym.com
subject: Can you schedule a weekly donation to help Helen win? It’ll cancel automatically on May 16th.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]
Today is exactly six weeks until Primary Election Day here in Philadelphia. It’ll be over before we know it!

That’s why we’re respectfully asking you to set up a $7 weekly donation (only $1/day) each week until polls close. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-weekly-em?amount=7&recurring=1] Before you scroll away, please give us a moment to explain why this is so important:

Helen is the Mayor that Philadelphians need — a tough Philly mom with a bold vision to make sure every family has peace and safety at home, a good school for their kids, and a job with fair wages and dignity.

But our campaign is up against self-funding millionaire candidates who have blanketed the airwaves for months, and we’re running out of time to spread Helen’s message to voters across the city. In these final six weeks, we must make every minute count!

We’re making our final preparations to win this election right now, and knowing you’ve committed to $7/week will go a long way towards making key investments from new ads to growing our mobilization efforts in every neighborhood. Your weekly support will make sure we remain competitive in this huge field of 11 candidates.

So what do you say: Can you spare $1 per day to send a tough Philly mom and proven leader like Helen to the Mayor’s Office? Click here to schedule a $7 weekly donation that will automatically cancel on Tuesday, May 16th. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-weekly-em?amount=7&recurring=1]

GIVE $7 WEEKLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-weekly-em?amount=7&recurring=1]

GIVE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-weekly-em?recurring=1]

If you’d prefer to instead make a one-time donation, you can click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em] . We’re truly so grateful for any amount you can contribute. Let’s build a safer, vibrant, thriving city – together!

Thank you,
Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]

body:

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: What we're able to do together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Together, we did it! I’m thrilled to announce...
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=9%2E1163%2EuHgeka)
I wanted to reach out today to say: **Thank you. I'm filled with gratitude.**
Together, we did it! I'm thrilled to announce that we raised over $300,000 in just the first month of our campaign, and exceeded our fundraising goal for the first FEC deadline.
These funds allow us to kick the campaign into high gear. We'll be able to hire a campaign manager, invest in on-the-ground organizing, and plan our ads and outreach strategies in the coming days and weeks.
**I'm running this race to win. We're just getting started, and each day I intend to show up, fight hard, and earn my place in Congress.**
We've been able to accomplish these short term milestones thanks to the strength and generosity of our community. So again, thank you for your support.
Onward,
Lateefah Simon
