name: Reyna (via Democrats.org)
subject: How my team is helping in Wisconsin >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I’m reaching out with a Voter Protection update concerning today’s state Supreme Court election in Wisconsin: | |
---
Derek, I’m Reyna, the Director of Civic Engagement and Voter Protection for the DNC. I’m reaching out with a Voter Protection update concerning today’s state Supreme Court election in Wisconsin. There are a lot of folks talking about today’s election, and it’s no surprise. After all, fair electoral maps and voting rights are on the ballot. **But Democrats are tracking this race, and our team is prepared to support voters all throughout the day.** We’re able to do this because the DNC has invested in state parties and voter protection infrastructure over the last few years. **In short, support from grassroots folks like you has empowered our party to build a solid foundation to mobilize and protect voters in elections like this one.** I want to take a moment to further explain what it is our team is doing to support voters in the Badger State, but first, [I need to ask for your help before polls close tonight. Democrats are relying on grassroots support to keep our work going strong. Will you chip in $7 to the DNC’s Voter Protection Fund today? ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJzwJl_lSNv8jgXe8B6_trG7UUCu-yIRUt6pejVx8HKkApdwVAzt3zgZjiyw0Z84aJrZhrIO8c7aVGLuHpHswWlMgov-mY54YCD1I-B1KjfVAS46_jaRDz3ZNQclgv44DohBV3CVF6ndcgiUXJ2swjgaLlblIj1aVHH8-KudJ8j52uApTxj6cmH5vPH6ZEd9HHcNFNj7RVRwIQmCXbEFfmrUOJ1rYPv2llk5V4pKl7bbTnhHCo0UDH4BBfZ4wQRm4MPcBKj3xFzPX8iNhMyJDi-a55jO4zUjireVZUTxB1h8IKsmJFp_qtDJ6VdwFQIZYIkXw8Kke4PPWhqqHkG6VTbjF6_ZZ9XFpZlYw_khTbcAuK7-bqcPOSsqNLBx556P-ejhZUrnYubgMzYYnIduSbVo46Qpf9rpMhKgTsFzpj0wPJX5K5NYJmD47dv_M6pZ9pVuvc3GxroBcfwL_mJ1KXmw/3v2/xNpGbQfzQvWsnhdd8mJn3g/h0/PWdb5pgRamuVg5eqI3hZQG4j_C_4_oZLJLbX7INTUp0)
[ **DONATE** ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJzwJl_lSNv8jgXe8B6_trG7UUCu-yIRUt6pejVx8HKkApdwVAzt3zgZjiyw0Z84aJrZhrIO8c7aVGLuHpHswWlB69SOXNAWUYikZVaortgpO2ChJVK0ORnqJlPsnYewkRNwPGg5QV6bAsgVuhs3gQGwVX-7LZKNYuzUyxbU0qPihFjxSxp0zzIeehhD-bDQPzdG679FUip52hcc4WNbtqs0V6K_X4X03dmLsYUEyIXtG48HmReDyvLUoaGUw6iU1LP1IW4ONzATLPRJf_d4HcJW4QDQTt0FO57-UtAdOIFovjzUtY-TGfddUSjP5mH4UVynrafw783ackHh_CPdpTZC_S3yGQyugb5UOpMef-FNCszq1lpZiUqpoL9UrJ-Wzz1trqtUjuYOpaWe9h68x6Jerg2vRJiN5dCLfMcWJf56Wg53omsgTOKy3gKfx-kTTGJ5UI_Ie0Ip4UTWIeNb7YtA/3v2/xNpGbQfzQvWsnhdd8mJn3g/h1/G_9-Y7Hd9SEiwVslCkupX5gcUFPgYSbIFWfYgFgtEuw)
Let’s start here: The Democratic Party of Wisconsin has experienced voter protection staff on the ground. The team is running a full program right now with observers on the ground, a state-specific hotline, and more. My team here at the DNC has been in _weekly_ communication with them -- providing the same technological and coaching support that we provide state parties across the nation. In addition, the DNC’s national voter protection hotline is running through the end of the election and our flagship hub for voter information -- IWillVote.com -- is updated with the latest election details for anyone to access. clean_body: I’m reaching out with a Voter Protection update concerning today’s state Supreme Court election in Wisconsin: | | Derek, I’m Reyna, the Director of Civic Engagement and Voter Protection for the DNC. I’m reaching out with a Voter Protection update concerning today’s state Supreme Court election in Wisconsin. There are a lot of folks talking about today’s election, and it’s no surprise. After all, fair electoral maps and voting rights are on the ballot. But Democrats are tracking this race, and our team is prepared to support voters all throughout the day. We’re able to do this because the DNC has invested in state parties and voter protection infrastructure over the last few years. In short, support from grassroots folks like you has empowered our party to build a solid foundation to mobilize and protect voters in elections like this one. I want to take a moment to further explain what it is our team is doing to support voters in the Badger State, but first, Let’s start here: The Democratic Party of Wisconsin has experienced voter protection staff on the ground. The team is running a full program right now with observers on the ground, a state-specific hotline, and more. My team here at the DNC has been in weekly communication with them -- providing the same technological and coaching support that we provide state parties across the nation. In addition, the DNC’s national voter protection hotline is running through the end of the election and our flagship hub for voter information -- IWillVote.com -- is updated with the latest election details for anyone to access. Thanks for reading, Reyna Reyna Walters-Morgan Director of Civic Engagement and Voter Protection Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . clean_body: It’s official, Donald Trump has turned himself in. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = We just witnessed history together, friend. A Manhattan judge has unsealed the envelope and it’s official: Donald Trump will be taken into custody for committing 34 felonies — stemming from the hush-money payments in 2016. Every American gets protection provided to them in the Constitution and under the rule of law. Including former presidents. But between January 6 and the classified files found at Mar-a-Largo, it was only a matter of time before Trump was FINALLY held accountable. And this is a huge next step in our efforts toward accountability of our failed former president. | = The chaos Trump called to New York proved to be an embarrassment for his base. However, we know that MAGA supporters and people like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Kevin McCarthy won’t stop whining about this blatant “attack on Trump from the libs.” Friend, no one is above the law, including former presidents. Eric knows that the fight to hold Donald Trump accountable doesn’t stop here. We still have not received any accountability from Trump for other crimes, like the violence on January 6th — and we won’t stop until we do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = — Team Swalwell | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! name: Josh Hawley
subject: re: my opponent’s numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, I was looking over the newest FEC fundraising numbers, and I was absolutely shocked.
_My Democrat opponent is hauling in MASSIVE amounts of cash from far-Left socialists across the country._

He’s connecting with the most radical donors from New York City to San Francisco, and they’re pouring money into our race here in Missouri.
**And with so much money coming in from the coasts, it’s going to be hard to catch up.**
I’m counting on my grassroots patriot force, and YOU are one of the most dedicated conservatives I know.

name: S. Brown
subject: I want to hear from you, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this:
**I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do.** For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure _your_ __ voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor.
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made over the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. **But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking top supporters like you to weigh in.**
I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since that just isn't possible, inviting you to join my new digital focus group is the next best thing.
[**Please, friend, will you take just a moment to share your thoughts with me? clean_body: | | | Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this: I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure your voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor. I’m proud of the progress we’ve made over the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking top supporters like you to weigh in. I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since that just isn't possible, inviting you to join my new digital focus group is the next best thing. | | Thank you for taking the time. I’m looking forward to reading what you have to say. With gratitude, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

name: CaucusRoom
subject: China Lied About Their Weather Balloon
body:
Will they listen to Psaki? No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qulikhk-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday! Colorado Members: Join us Tonight at 5:30 pm for a [discussion with Jesse Mallory from Americans for Prosperity.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-y/) **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-t/) **Trump In Court Today** Former President Trump will **[appear in court](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-i/)** for his arraignment today. His lawyers **[opposed a request from media outlets](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-d/)** for camera's to be in the courtroom. _Considering what happened yesterday, I think that's a good request._ **Pelosi's Wild Imagination** Nancy Pelosi claims that Russian President **[Putin"interfered" in the 2016 election because he "feared" former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-h/)**. **It Was NOT a Weather Balloon** It should surprise no one to learn **[that China lied about the weather balloon](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-k/)** and the Biden administration knew it the entire time. _It's so much worse than we could have imagined._ **Democrats Lied** A new report from Goldman Sachs confirms what conservatives warned all along - Democrats'**["Inflation Reduction Act" is actually just another enormous spending bill](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-u/) **that will blow out the deficit in service of a far-left agenda. **Will They Listen to Psaki?** **[Jen Psaki had some interesting advice for members of her party](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-o/) r**egarding the indictment of former President Donald Trump. **Russia Won't Like This** **[Finland will become the 31st member of Nato](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-x/)o**n Tuesday, the Western military alliance's secretary general has announced. **Mayorkas is a Failure** Mayorkas said what is happening at the southern border is a challenge, but **[you won't believe his reason for not admitting the truth.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-m/)**

**Easter Potato Hunt?** With egg prices still high, the**[potato industry is looking to scramble up Easter traditions with a budget-friendly alternative](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-c/): **Easter potatoes! **Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* You **[suck](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-a/)**.
* Bud Light goes **[WOKE](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-f/).**
* **[Hindsight](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-z/).**
* **[Did you know](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-v/)?**

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-e/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-w/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qulikhk-trhiujldw-yh/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qulikhk-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-yu) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qulikhk-trhiujldw-jl/)

The radical Left is pushing a dangerous movement on America’s children.

They’re saying that if you’re a boy, you can live as a girl - and that you should pursue potentially dangerous, expensive, untested medical treatments to do it.
It threatens the very nature of truth, and it puts our children in harm's way so the radical Left can use them as their test subjects.
We must take every step to preserve the innocence of our children, especially against the cruel forces of woke, democratic policy.
**_As your Governor, I’ve done everything I can to protect our children by keeping this woke propaganda OUT of our schools - and I’m running again because our children deserve better than the radical Democrat party._**

We must take every step to preserve the innocence of our children, especially against the cruel forces of woke, democratic policy. As your Governor, I’ve done everything I can to protect our children by keeping this woke propaganda OUT of our schools - and I’m running again because our children deserve better than the radical Democrat party. name: Fetterman HQ
subject: John's heading back to the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, in case you didn’t hear the news — John left Walter Reed last week, and is getting back to fighting like hell as your U.S. Senator.
All of us on this team couldn’t be happier for the Fetterman family.
We think it would be incredible to show John that we have his back as he returns to the Senate.
**[So if you can, show your support and chip in a donation. It's an important moment to show that we believe in John to fight for us in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230404-1?refcode=em20230404-1-8320&refcode2=8320_434096_5LVXMr&akid=8320%2E434096%2E5LVXMr)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230404-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230404-8320&refcode2=8320_434096_5LVXMr&akid=8320%2E434096%2E5LVXMr)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you,
💛 Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230404-8320-footer&t=1&refcode2=8320_434096_5LVXMr&akid=8320%2E434096%2E5LVXMr)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

body:
| | Peter, I’m just making sure you got a chance to read through Senator Schumer's kind note.
---
I'm incredibly honored to have the senator's support during this critical moment in our fight for progress, and I hope you'll take his words to heart. From the GOP's constant attacks on our right to vote to the relentless assault on reproductive rights in our nation, every single dollar you can spare _will_ help me fight for the voiceless and vulnerable.
**[Will you answer Senator Schumer's call-to-action by making a donation before midnight? Your gift will be split between his and my campaigns. We want to raise another $2,500 before midnight, but can't get there without supporters like you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61290045/399669113/-1790581528?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1023-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTUwOGUwZS0zNGQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwL-5KrmPr759ywmIfsXZSk9pxD_TemDbLPCh_MM9Ms=)**
Thank you for answering the call.

Letitia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sen. Chuck Schumer**
Date: Thurs, Mar 23, 2023
Subject: My friend Letitia James
| | |
---
Hi, Peter, it’s Sen. Schumer – and I need to be blunt for a second.

I’ve seen a lot of things during my time in office – but the GOP’s _constant_ attempts to rip more and more rights from vulnerable Americans are among the most _alarming_ I’ve seen yet.

From the crusade against voting rights to the latest attacks on reproductive freedom, MAGA extremists in Congress have made it clear that they’ll stop at _nothing_ to push forward their agenda. And, while my colleagues and I are working around the clock to defend our fundamental rights in the Senate, we need strong defenders of progress at the state level, as well, to fend off the GOP’s attacks.

**Peter, Letitia James is _exactly_ the kind of fearless fighter we need defending New York. That’s why I told her team that I would help them raise $10,000 before midnight tonight to help power her work, and I’m counting on _you_ ****to chip in.**

[**Please, will you donate any amount you can spare to Letitia James’ and my campaigns now to help her fight back against the powerful and corrupt?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61290046/399669114/-1790581528?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1023-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTUwOGUwZS0zNGQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwL-5KrmPr759ywmIfsXZSk9pxD_TemDbLPCh_MM9Ms=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Letitia James and Chuck Schumer will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61290047/399669115/-1790581528?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1023-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTUwOGUwZS0zNGQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwL-5KrmPr759ywmIfsXZSk9pxD_TemDbLPCh_MM9Ms=)

| | [Donate another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61290050/399669118/-1790581528?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1023-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTUwOGUwZS0zNGQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwL-5KrmPr759ywmIfsXZSk9pxD_TemDbLPCh_MM9Ms=)

As someone who was _also_ born and raised in Brooklyn, New York, I’m incredibly proud of the work that Letitia James has done for our state. She has brought many of the most powerful and well-funded actors in our nation to justice, tackled the housing crisis that has spiraled in New York, and fought to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care. And still, she’s not done fighting yet.

Peter, with MAGA extremists working to restrict abortion rights, gut Social Security and Medicare, and more, we _need_ a fearless fighter in office who refuses to bow, break, or be bullied. That’s why I’m proud to support Letitia James and the hard work she’s done so far for New Yorkers – and I’m counting on you to stand with me.

[**So please, will you make a split donation between me and Letitia James to help fund her fight for justice and progress? Any amount you can spare will make a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61290051/399669120/-1790581528?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1023-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTUwOGUwZS0zNGQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwL-5KrmPr759ywmIfsXZSk9pxD_TemDbLPCh_MM9Ms=)
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61290054/399669121/-1790581528?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1023-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTUwOGUwZS0zNGQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwL-5KrmPr759ywmIfsXZSk9pxD_TemDbLPCh_MM9Ms=)

Thank you for stepping up for New York’s working families.

Onward,

Chuck Schumer

name: Rep. Wiley Nickel
subject: Last week’s vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230404-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230404-email]Team,
I want to make sure you saw my tweet from last week:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230404-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230404-email]
I’ll be honest. In just the first three months of 2023, we’ve had countless mass shootings in schools. The last thing that elected officials should be concerned about is banning books.
Our children deserve more. They deserve access to all the tools needed to prepare them for a successful future, and they deserve adults who are brave enough to stand up and fight.
So many folks in Congress lose sight of what matters. Their judgment is clouded by the partisan divide.
I will never lose sight of what matters. As a father of two beautiful children, I know the feeling of sending my kids off to school and feeling worried about what may happen when they are out of my sight. I know how important educational opportunities are, and how many American students do not have the same opportunities as others.
While many elected officials say one thing and do another, I will always remain focused on the priorities that matter most. If you can, please consider chipping in a few dollars to support my campaign to keep me fighting this important fight for our future in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn?refcode=230404-email]
Thank you,
Wiley Nickel
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!

Friend,
I’m writing you this email as I fly back home to Mar-a-Lago.
While we are living through the darkest hours of American history, I can say that at least for this moment right now, I am in great spirits...
...Because my team showed me all of the support, the love, the prayers, and the donations YOU gave our movement while I was getting arrested and arraigned.
You are why I could _**NEVER**_ give up our mission to save America – no matter how nasty and vicious the attacks ever got.
_**Since news of the indictment first broke, I’ve been informed that our campaign has raised over $10,000,000.**_
We outraised every single Democrat – **COMBINED**. And it’s all thanks to donors giving $1, $5, $24, $47, $100...
I have never been more certain that we will win back the White House and save our Great Nation.
_**Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**_

clean_body: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | | Friend, I’m writing you this email as I fly back home to Mar-a-Lago. While we are living through the darkest hours of American history, I can say that at least for this moment right now, I am in great spirits... ...Because my team showed me all of the support, the love, the prayers, and the donations YOU gave our movement while I was getting arrested and arraigned. You are why I could NEVER give up our mission to save America – no matter how nasty and vicious the attacks ever got. Since news of the indictment first broke, I’ve been informed that our campaign has raised over $10,000,000. We outraised every single Democrat – COMBINED. And it’s all thanks to donors giving $1, $5, $24, $47, $100... I have never been more certain that we will win back the White House and save our Great Nation. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, | Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Then They Came For Me...
body:
Today they came for Donald Trump, tomorrow it could be you or I. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e79bde889d09/then-they-came-for-me?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | My Fellow Patriots,

The weaponization of the justice system against President Trump should serve as warning to all Americans, that our government have been infiltrated by the types people the Constitution was designed to protect us from. Raising our voices within our respective networks regarding the authoritarian encroachment is important but it will not save us from a tyrannical government.

My decision to become Chairwoman of the Michigan Republican Party is purely to save all of our children’s futures. We are up against an authoritarian agenda. I wasn’t going to wait and see if someone else would take this threat serious enough to stop. So, I am asking you to step up and do the same, step up and STOP the authoritarian encroachment on our children’s future.
I am reaching out to you today with a crucial request. Our state is facing a critical moment in its history and we need your help to return Michigan to a stronghold for constitutionalism.

The Democrat Party is pushing a globalist-authoritarian agenda that threatens our very way of life. This is beyond raising taxes. This about the intentional collapse of the United States of America via the attack on our sovereignty, the human family, our constitutional rights, and our RIGHT to freely express devotion to God. We cannot afford to let them succeed in their efforts to transform Michigan into a another fallen domino in their plot.
That is why I am asking for your support in our fundraising efforts. Every dollar you donate will go directly towards our efforts to defend Michigan against the Democratic Party’s authoritarian agenda. We must properly support a strong grassroots movement, defend and promote our constitutionalist principles, educate voters, mobilize voters, and support Republican candidates who will fight for our values in Lansing and beyond.
[**DONATE HERE**](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=1448c3e330&e=a2af77507c)
Your donation will help us to:
* Recruit and train volunteers to get out the vote and spread our message across Michigan
* Develop and run _effective_ election integrity efforts across the state to secure our elections, which is a matter of national survival
* Run targeted digital and print advertising campaigns that will reach voters across the state
* Support Republican candidates running for local and state offices
* Conduct polling and research that will help us to identify effective methods of communicating our message to voters

We cannot do this alone. We need your help to ensure that Michigan remains a beacon of hope and opportunity for generations to come. Please consider making a generous donation today to help us fight for our shared values and principles.
We should never forget the words of Martin Niemöller.
_First they came for the socialists, and I did not speak out—because I was not a socialist._ _Then they came for the trade unionists, and I did not speak out—because I was not a trade unionist._ _Then they came for the Jews, and I did not speak out—because I was not a Jew._ _Then they came for me—and there was no one left to speak for me._ \- Martin Niemöller
In Liberty,

Kristina Karamo
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party
---
|
---

clean_body: Today they came for Donald Trump, tomorrow it could be you or I. | | | | | | | My Fellow Patriots, The weaponization of the justice system against President Trump should serve as warning to all Americans, that our government have been infiltrated by the types people the Constitution was designed to protect us from. Raising our voices within our respective networks regarding the authoritarian encroachment is important but it will not save us from a tyrannical government. My decision to become Chairwoman of the Michigan Republican Party is purely to save all of our children’s futures. We are up against an authoritarian agenda. I wasn’t going to wait and see if someone else would take this threat serious enough to stop. So, I am asking you to step up and do the same, step up and STOP the authoritarian encroachment on our children’s future. I am reaching out to you today with a crucial request. Our state is facing a critical moment in its history and we need your help to return Michigan to a stronghold for constitutionalism. The Democrat Party is pushing a globalist-authoritarian agenda that threatens our very way of life. This is beyond raising taxes. This about the intentional collapse of the United States of America via the attack on our sovereignty, the human family, our constitutional rights, and our RIGHT to freely express devotion to God. We cannot afford to let them succeed in their efforts to transform Michigan into a another fallen domino in their plot. That is why I am asking for your support in our fundraising efforts. Every dollar you donate will go directly towards our efforts to defend Michigan against the Democratic Party’s authoritarian agenda. We must properly support a strong grassroots movement, defend and promote our constitutionalist principles, educate voters, mobilize voters, and support Republican candidates who will fight for our values in Lansing and beyond. Your donation will help us to: Recruit and train volunteers to get out the vote and spread our message across Michigan Develop and run effective election integrity efforts across the state to secure our elections, which is a matter of national survival Run targeted digital and print advertising campaigns that will reach voters across the state Support Republican candidates running for local and state offices Conduct polling and research that will help us to identify effective methods of communicating our message to voters We cannot do this alone. We need your help to ensure that Michigan remains a beacon of hope and opportunity for generations to come. Please consider making a generous donation today to help us fight for our shared values and principles. We should never forget the words of Martin Niemöller. First they came for the socialists, and I did not speak out—because I was not a socialist. Then they came for the trade unionists, and I did not speak out—because I was not a trade unionist. Then they came for the Jews, and I did not speak out—because I was not a Jew. Then they came for me—and there was no one left to speak for me. \- Martin Niemöller In Liberty, Kristina Karamo Chairwoman Michigan Republican Party | | | "DONATE HERE" | | | | | | | | | | | | Our mailing address is:** 3450 Alpine Ave. NW Box 332 Grand Rapids, MI 49544 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | Contributions can be made digitally or by mail. Paid for with regulated funds by the Michigan Republican Party www.migop.org

| | Donald Trump's first indictment has been handed down. But what's really scandalous is the reaction from the right. Trump has been indicted for breaking the law while trying to hide embarrassing secrets just days before the 2016 election. Like anyone, Trump is innocent until proven guilty. But like anyone, he should be fully accountable for any crimes he committed. **But that's not what the Republican Party seems to think.** Nearly every Republican politician is saying, in effect, that Donald Trump is above the law. That no matter the evidence, or what crimes he might have committed, they don't think he should be prosecuted. Trump tried to orchestrate a coup to hold onto office. He tried to withhold crucial aid to Ukraine to blackmail them for fabricated dirt on his political opponent. They let him off for that, and now they're saying that regardless of any crimes he committed, he should get off again. No matter how far into the sewer Trump goes, it seems most Republican leaders will be right there with him. **That's why they cannot be trusted with power, and why I'm asking for your help to ensure they don't win back the Senate.** We know if Trump wins the presidency and MAGA Republicans take the Senate, all of our rights will be in danger. Trump has no respect for our law, our Constitution, or our institutions, and apparently Republicans will never stand up to him. We can't risk them taking power again. We must work tirelessly to build the grassroots movement needed to stop Trump, stop his MAGA allies in the House and Senate, and protect our democracy. **I've asked you, time and time again, to join me in this fight. I know we're all tired, but we cannot grow weary. name: Team AOC
subject: Survey: Trump’s indictment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We want to hear from you today.
#
Trump made history today, becoming the first sitting or former president to be finger-printed and formally arraigned on criminal charges.
This is the first of several legal challenges he is facing: there's also a criminal probe into whether he illegally tried to overturn 2020 election results in Georgia, and two investigations by special counsel over his handling of classified documents after leaving office.1
And now we want to hear from you: **How do you feel about Trump's potential charges and what messaging do you think will have the greatest effect on his supporters?**
[Take our short survey and let us know how you feel about Trump’s appearance in court today →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/trump-arrest-survey/?source=em20230404-4085-P_ENG_RES_MIS&t=1&akid=4085%2E2526796%2E1Zs_QY)
**[Take the survey →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/trump-arrest-survey/?source=em20230404-4085-P_ENG_RES_MIS&t=2&akid=4085%2E2526796%2E1Zs_QY)**
Alexandria has minced no words about Trump’s legacy, which has paved the way for a wave of fascist and white nationalist groups to build power in government. No matter what the outcome is for Trump at the end of this trial, we must remain vigilant against the continued rise of Trumpism.
**[Let us know your thoughts →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/trump-arrest-survey/?source=em20230404-4085-P_ENG_RES_MIS&t=3&akid=4085%2E2526796%2E1Zs_QY)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [U.S. News](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/17959?t=4&akid=4085%2E2526796%2E1Zs_QY)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20230404-4085-P_ENG_RES_MIS&t=5&refcode2=4085_2526796_1Zs_QY&akid=4085%2E2526796%2E1Zs_QY)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230404-4085-P_ENG_RES_MIS&t=6&akid=4085%2E2526796%2E1Zs_QY)**

clean_body: this can’t wait. | = Rep. Jim Jordan and the GOP should be ASHAMED of themselves: | | Jim Jordan BLOCKS Lifesaving Gun Legislation Amid Demands for Action ---|--- MAGA Jim Jordan loves to call himself “pro-life,” yet uses his position as Chair of the Judiciary Committee to shut down common sense gun legislation that the majority of Americans want. There have already been 38 mass shootings in the past month alone. I’m sick and tired of the constant excuses. Enough is enough. As a mother, I’m shaken to my core that parents like me have to fear for our children’s lives every time they step foot in school. Passing common sense gun legislation is one of my top priorities. And I refuse to let Jim Jordan and House Republicans sit back and do nothing. Thank you for signing. This is too important to ignore. Tamie Wilson | | Paid for by Tamie Wilson for US 273 SARATOGA ST. DELAWARE, OH 43015 www.tamiewilson.com Please, consider making a =. body:
🎉 three birthdays and a public health award! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg4WKhBZGY5l3EHm4sq2zUxILdH5-opk6mGZQUUxln-E43KkIA9VvEQQ1TQ6aLLJsaHo8frLLyfCVYAI3NgzZ34qfRl_0m6UK-YXF6Qwj9TO_KUmNGCmHKE-1IlJhmc_s4A/3v2/aJtvbmHtSBuUVwfpCuvfVA/h0/WFy9IsbdOHmFRWHTac2sfIHtzUKmZWUJgvRZT2yT3no) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
---
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqeNGQ-sHe-NViQSGkreeSfR8GYEJN3zbL1rFBn6wlwwBK4vJ132B7FcUYDADKDEL-fvcingPufBysk21oqB8R0Gc-oQL0iOSjnMuPOooJYuwGsq0PUnl9Oogy7jkzi2PN1Us_28UFm6zpkb62Ja4WZUQtS1OaFgmV3Iz_aFS7czc/3v2/aJtvbmHtSBuUVwfpCuvfVA/h1/wJuSYzYfKHwEHhu216-pAX2WzufMUu2R8X5cn2WSV8Y)
| Hello!

This will be a longer email that I wanted to use as an opportunity to update you on happenings in Congress, from our office, but also to peel back the curtain on what I’m up to when I’m not in D.C. Last month, our family be celebrated **THREE** birthdays, with my mother celebrating her 80th and the twins both celebrating their 8th! | [CHIP IN $8 NOW »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKMESXaE6NL3dPa6SXUcsfAu7AkbVzuhTisw-gymIzNAvEwi-hhU1CADbxKGicGU5vsCJRwnUvkhOF27s2fbSGa74Uca6NpxBNvDur5g9X7TJKFcTsssZTTftQHoiC3vdAKB5yUtMyXUXWeyTolUOLW95YEwztik3t2esdi6Rc7OuqVL694MkknRWDVdY61D6vvPmoBIGlMx4MlX-TQb_9e-VdugSuRuSMOEUUpfyF0ExOc1oVd-EoJViujZsZQVjiV2Jc0C-rWdEfZdsES89UOfLU_DZRSkalARl6I7TIY9Yu5gE2ZurrghwF_vAfebZNEUgwUW7RlV91oFW-Pk2GQYdI2-_KXU2J3bcYoaeOQQU/3v2/aJtvbmHtSBuUVwfpCuvfVA/h2/7ZantoGwMoEer3pqzrzrjYwWe7skznVFbHPfIP8dSSQ)
---
The girls and I love to go hiking out in the beautiful desert with Blue in tow, and those hikes really drive home how important it is to protect our environment for future generations.

Not only are these areas a boon for our local economy, but they add to the spirit of our community. And this is personal for me, team. If we don’t address the environmental & public health concerns of our region, **then my daughters may not be able to go on hikes with their kids one day.
**
I sat down with Comité Cívico del Valle and Audubon California to talk about this exact issue.
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKMESXaE6NL3dPa6SXUcsfAu7AkbVzuhTisw-gymIzNAvEwi-hhU1CADbxKGicGU5vsCJRwnUvkhOF27s2fbSGa74Uca6NpxBNvDur5g9X7TK0Iuno_OzAott_7sTjTq0y7lGYevTD3PciEFh2bkVTh5b0ur36DgXW81XAvnrvH5JZJ0G8a39pWKkq6ANiV5GpaZ021DEagK49wv81j28wH8Uxmf4tVz2TYrvzRYNnSaZKlX6bUtkN55wbJXegsvXnXb8b6v29NjZGvNfcL0Yy9wa-dHPOwTmu0zuAMIS7m7QlWnrWh6PF9ZwRT0lYQzWxcgG1ym-1saJlu-CRRTNIVb7p4zb2xMdcSrs0JOS6fE0/3v2/aJtvbmHtSBuUVwfpCuvfVA/h3/Pb1mnudZUKcoRKE14WDccYgAboWmPbW9eZ-tdU_BbwM)
**On the topic of public health** , my team and I have been busy this month meeting with various health care leaders and organizations to address how we can work together to improve access to healthcare in our communities.

I met with leaders from National Association of Community Health Centers, Partners In Health, National Association of Community Health Workers, and Vision y Compromiso to discuss how we can not only improve access and outcomes, but also support the dedicated healthcare workers who are doing the work on the ground.
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKMESXaE6NL3dPa6SXUcsfAu7AkbVzuhTisw-gymIzNAvEwi-hhU1CADbxKGicGU5vsCJRwnUvkhOF27s2fbSGa74Uca6NpxBNvDur5g9X7TJDOOjIsVMrMQadek6DHYAZx0CFoPbmFb5gxnA1IdJS520T-fp7T9KM3sloqyUEzbiBZNEP4ecxXd6k7Kfs6QxbtacUl56Im1ZLwldb1Rt8OYXqQVLgk9u-MY4C0eEuFMDuEVrs5rUYeHkcoiEe9jCwNKukQoNGuoaimGhx3ErJ3WZjc4T-rVxue1aKr_Nx80H72cgb9dyW1erMpvRvTvJYtscvVVHBiHTJZ5_bv0p_mMVBb0bGWbWkwHPmA5rkTlY/3v2/aJtvbmHtSBuUVwfpCuvfVA/h4/ZAwmO6ZTGtKxi90FMfCNrpR8pHWymykuNFFCyvjPIzY)
I will say, it was a nice break from other happenings in Washington, where we held our first hearing of the Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic. In that hearing, I was sickened to see that the GOP invited a witness who has peddled racist, faux-scientific theories that have been publicly praised by white supremacists, including David Duke.

**Now, Republicans are coming after me for calling out their bogus conspiracies for what they are, and asking why they called on a witness whose work has been praised by white supremacists.
**
You know, unlike other members of Congress, I don’t have all day to spend on the phone and beg mega-donors for campaign checks. I’m too busy fighting for our public health, to ensure we keep our drinking water safe, and do more to protect our environment.

[**So, can I count on you to chip in just $8 or another amount today? Your donation will help our campaign stay ahead of GOP attacks so we can return to Congress and keep fighting for you »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKMESXaE6NL3dPa6SXUcsfApFs79AHhX8hIHR2YnrDHLn9FbeH1-LnBIR3v4VN3ygR-hu-a5Rh51vb912SmgJ4yc9PMzaHLxCJeQJx1GmK3HNAMCgBxLhq_xVMKP7VtJTXTwk0rrPFXdcEYIFcUJrYynCEaeFFjULlPldWhl2kuKvC9uVvA3gnGFn4O-JDubWBFsQ3FM6_WAIK7MRTDZJOC1JECJ2pBdHVIU7afNA2FEl4Hg9cLirLt0_gll0PaAzaNGhao-8rJw2t_8HPDYjU20Nu4rSfpXlwQ85ATXRG4IGbzSy5665qynzlzxdh8dABjAX9i1GhnzLppNzEf9hmmA/3v2/aJtvbmHtSBuUVwfpCuvfVA/h5/QubyJg-C0gZ4k7YJxs90KfjruJgPpDcKGrgerCCfQ6Y)****

clean_body: 🎉 three birthdays and a public health award! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Hello! This will be a longer email that I wanted to use as an opportunity to update you on happenings in Congress, from our office, but also to peel back the curtain on what I’m up to when I’m not in D.C. Last month, our family be celebrated THREE birthdays, with my mother celebrating her 80th and the twins both celebrating their 8th! | The girls and I love to go hiking out in the beautiful desert with Blue in tow, and those hikes really drive home how important it is to protect our environment for future generations. Not only are these areas a boon for our local economy, but they add to the spirit of our community. And this is personal for me, team. If we don’t address the environmental & public health concerns of our region, then my daughters may not be able to go on hikes with their kids one day. I sat down with Comité Cívico del Valle and Audubon California to talk about this exact issue. On the topic of public health , my team and I have been busy this month meeting with various health care leaders and organizations to address how we can work together to improve access to healthcare in our communities. I met with leaders from National Association of Community Health Centers, Partners In Health, National Association of Community Health Workers, and Vision y Compromiso to discuss how we can not only improve access and outcomes, but also support the dedicated healthcare workers who are doing the work on the ground. I will say, it was a nice break from other happenings in Washington, where we held our first hearing of the Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic. In that hearing, I was sickened to see that the GOP invited a witness who has peddled racist, faux-scientific theories that have been publicly praised by white supremacists, including David Duke. Now, Republicans are coming after me for calling out their bogus conspiracies for what they are, and asking why they called on a witness whose work has been praised by white supremacists. You know, unlike other members of Congress, I don’t have all day to spend on the phone and beg mega-donors for campaign checks. I’m too busy fighting for our public health, to ensure we keep our drinking water safe, and do more to protect our environment. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for reading all the way to the end, friend. I can't thank you enough for all your support. Congressman Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 Please, consider making a . I never could have imagined just how many patriots would rush to the defense of our America First movement. It has truly been an inspiration. YOU are the source of my courage, my resolve, and my confidence that we WILL win back the White House and Make America Great Again! The radical Left Democrats and Soros’ hand-picked District Attorney thought they could intimidate me – and intimidate YOU out of voting for me. They thought this baseless and politically charged witch hunt would lead us to end our 2024 campaign. But let me be as clear as possible: this witch hunt, like all the others, will only BACKFIRE on Biden! In fact, it already has... How fitting that I should return home to be LEADING in the polls! | BREAKING: “Donald Trump’s lead is growing...” [Source: Newsmax] Friend, now is the time to PROVE just how much STRONGER these witch-hunt crazed radicals have made our movement. Peter,

I wanted to reach out personally and thank you for your incredible support. This was our first quarterly reporting deadline of 2023 — and thanks to you, **_we showed that this grassroots campaign is strong and ready to win again in 2024._**

Your support is so critical because the GOP just added me to their list of top targets for 2024. That means we can expect the attacks to start any day.

It’s grassroots supporters like you, Peter, who showed the GOP that our campaign isn’t slowing down.

[Let’s keep this momentum going — after a hard-fought and close election last year, we know that 2024 will be just as tough a battle. If you can, will you chip in $10 or more so we can start this quarter strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61291934/399675754/-1524014841?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230405_FR_ThankYou_0_3MO_Seth_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGI4YzUzNy00MWQzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SyJOGWm6Wva8xmE_RlBnLJuhtlNQ_okGtB8eqKX6CTY=)

Seth

body:
To MAGA Republicans, it’s “law and order” until Trump gets arrested.
#
Peter, it's finally happened:
**Today, the twice-impeached former White-Supremacist-in-Chief has been arraigned before a judge.** However, unlike millions of others being held in jails across the country, awaiting their day in court, the former President gets to go back home tonight. _No mugshot, no handcuffs._
This is yet another example of how there’s two justice systems in America — one for the rich and well-connected and the other for the rest of us.
Since learning he was to be indicted, Trump has signaled that if he is held accountable for his crimes, there will be civil unrest and potentially worse, similar to what we saw after the 2020 election and on January 6, 2021.
Today’s MAGA “rally” outside the NYC courthouse was one such attempt to intimidate other prosecutors and the Department of Justice from continuing their ongoing investigations into Trump.
In the days since announcing his arrest, Trump and his Republican allies in Congress have raised millions off his criminality. The far-right will only be emboldened by news of his arraignment and arrest. And we will need the resources to stand up and fight back.
[**With the 2024 election approaching, if you’re able to, can you pitch in to fuel our movement today to confront Trump and his far-right allies?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230404.RkUMY9&amount=5&refcode=em20230404-2457&t=1&akid=2457%2E1082990%2EhM8K-X)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230404.RkUMY9&amount=5&refcode=em20230404-2457&t=20&akid=2457%2E1082990%2EhM8K-X)**
In solidarity,
Adrastos, Campaign Manager
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230404?refcode=em20230404-2457-footer&t=21&refcode2=2457_1082990_hM8K-X&akid=2457%2E1082990%2EhM8K-X) **

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

As the President has said countless times, patriots like YOU are the reason he willingly endures these vicious attacks. This is just the price to save our nation. And nothing would energize him more before he delivers his Remarks to the Nation than to see all of the love he’s received from patriots all across America. You have to ask yourself: why is the Left going to such incredible lengths to try and stop President Trump? Because they know that President Trump is the ONLY candidate who can’t be bought, bullied, or controlled. We just watched President Trump march straight into the belly of the beast. You can be certain that he will ALWAYS have the courage to STAND UP FOR YOU. But now, the President needs YOU to stand with him.
